name: Bulbasaur
pokedex: Bulbasaur can be seen napping in bright sunlight. There is a seed on its back. By soaking up the sun's rays, the seed grows progressively larger.

name: Ivysaur
pokedex: To support its bulb, Ivysaur's legs grow sturdy. If it spends more time lying in the sunlight, the bud will soon bloom into a large flower.

name: Venusaur
pokedex: Venusaur's flower is said to take on vivid colors if it gets plenty of nutrition and sunlight. The flower's aroma soothes the emotions of people.

name: Charmander
pokedex: The flame that burns at the tip of its tail is an indication of its emotions. The flame wavers when Charmander is happy, and blazes when it is enraged.

name: Charmeleon
pokedex: Without pity, its sharp claws destroy foes. If it encounters a strong enemy, it becomes agitated, and the flame on its tail flares with a bluish white color.

name: Charizard
pokedex: A Charizard flies about in search of strong opponents. It breathes intense flames that can melt any material. However, it will never torch a weaker foe.

name: Squirtle
pokedex: Its shell is not just for protection. Its rounded shape and the grooves on its surface minimize resistance in water, enabling Squirtle to swim at high speeds.

name: Wartortle
pokedex: Its large tail is covered with rich, thick fur that deepens in color with age. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this Pokémon's toughness in battle.

name: Blastoise
pokedex: The waterspouts that protrude from its shell are highly accurate. Their bullets of water can precisely nail tin cans from a distance of over 160 feet.

name: Caterpie
pokedex: Tiene una cabeza y ojos muy grandes y unas antenas rojas llamativas, todo para asemejarse a un Ekans e intimidar a sus muchos depredadores.

name: Metapod
pokedex: Utiliza una seda especial que se endurece al contacto con el aire para crear una coraza resistente mientras espera para evolucionar de nuevo.

name: Butterfree
pokedex: Tiene un gran apetito y puede alejarse hasta 10km para buscar miel y almacenarla en su nido. Poliniza a muchos Pokémon planta.

name: Weedle
pokedex: Los aguijones de su cabeza y cola liberan veneno al mínimo roce y pueden producir desde sensación de picor o quemazón hasta nauseas.

name: Kakuna
pokedex: Viven en colmenas donde los Weedle se ayudan a hacerse las pupas o corazas y los Beedrill protegen al resto hasta que evolucionan.

name: Beedrill
pokedex: En cada colmena hay una Beedrill reina que es la que pone huevos y el resto la defiende. El más fuerte además la fecunda cuando es necesario.

name: Pidgey
pokedex: It has an extremely sharp sense of direction. It can unerringly return home to its nest, however far it may be removed from its familiar surroundings.

name: Pidgeotto
pokedex: This Pokémon flies around, patrolling its large territory. If its living space is violated, it shows no mercy in thoroughly punishing the foe with its sharp claws.

name: Pidgeot
pokedex: This Pokémon has gorgeous, glossy feathers. Many trainers are so captivated by the beautiful feathers on its head that they choose Pidgeot as their Pokémon.

name: Rattata
pokedex: A Rattata is cautious in the extreme. Even while it is asleep, it constantly moves its ears and listens for danger. It will make its nest anywhere.

name: Raticate
pokedex: A Raticate's sturdy fangs grow steadily. To keep them ground down, it gnaws on rocks and logs. It may even chew on the walls of houses.

name: Spearow
pokedex: Its loud cry can be heard over half a mile away. If its high, keening cry is heard echoing all around, it is a sign that they are warning each other of danger.

name: Fearow
pokedex: Its long neck and elongated beak are ideal for catching prey in soil or water. It deftly moves this extended and skinny beak to pluck prey.

name: Ekans
pokedex: An Ekans curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. This position allows it to quickly respond to an enemy from any direction with a threat from its upraised head.

name: Arbok
pokedex: This Pokémon has a terrifically strong constricting power. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once it wraps its body around its foe, escaping is impossible.

name: Pikachu
pokedex: It stores electricity in the electric sacs on its cheeks. When it releases pent-up energy in a burst, the electric power is equal to a lightning bolt.

name: Raichu
pokedex: If it stores too much electricity, its behavior turns aggressive. To avoid this, it occasionally discharges excess energy and calms itself down.

name: Sandshrew
pokedex: When it curls up in a ball, it can make any attack bounce off harmlessly. Its hide has turned tough and solid as a result of living in the desert.

name: Sandslash
pokedex: It curls up in a ball to protect itself from enemy attacks. It also curls up to prevent heatstroke during the daytime when temperatures rise sharply.

name: Nidoran
pokedex: Its highly toxic barbs are thought to have developed as protection for this small-bodied Pokémon. When enraged, it releases a horrible toxin from its horn.

name: Nidorina
pokedex: When it is with its friends or family, its barbs are tucked away to prevent injury. It appears to become nervous if separated from the others.

name: Nidoqueen
pokedex: It is adept at sending foes flying with harsh tackles using its tough, scaly body. This Pokémon is at its strongest when it is defending its young.

name: Nidoran
pokedex: The male Nidoran has developed muscles that freely move its ears in any direction. Even the slightest sound does not escape this Pokémon's notice.

name: Nidorino
pokedex: Its horn is harder than a diamond. If it senses a hostile presence, all the barbs on its back bristle up at once, and it challenges the foe with all its might.

name: Nidoking
pokedex: A Nidoking's thick tail packs enormously destructive power capable of toppling a metal transmission tower. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

name: Clefairy
pokedex: On every night of a full moon, they come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired Clefairy go to sleep nestled up against each other in deep and quiet mountains.

name: Clefable
pokedex: A Clefable uses its wings to skip lightly as if it were flying. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. On quiet, moonlit nights, it strolls on lakes.

name: Vulpix
pokedex: It can freely control fire, making fiery orbs fly like will-o'-the-wisps. Just before evolution, its six tails grow hot as if on fire.

name: Ninetales
pokedex: It has long been said that each of the nine tails embody an enchanted power. A long-lived Ninetales will have fur that shines like gold.

name: Jigglypuff
pokedex: Puede inflarse de aire hasta volúmenes increíbles para poder flotar o cantar durante un largo tiempo sin necesidad de coger aire.

name: Wigglytuff
pokedex: Controla muy bien su capacidad para inflarse e intimidar así a sus enemigos y propinarles golpes más dolorosos al tener un tamaño mayor.

name: Zubat
pokedex: While living in pitch-black caverns, their eyes gradually grew shut and deprived them of vision. They use ultrasonic waves to detect obstacles.

name: Golbat
pokedex: Its fangs easily puncture even thick animal hide. It loves to feast on the blood of people and Pokémon. It flits about in darkness and strikes from behind.

name: Oddish
pokedex: This Pokémon grows by absorbing moonlight. During the daytime, it buries itself in the ground, leaving only its leaves exposed to avoid detection by its enemies.

name: Gloom
pokedex: A horribly noxious honey drools from its mouth. One whiff of the honey can result in memory loss. Some fans are said to enjoy this overwhelming stink, however.

name: Vileplume
pokedex: In seasons when it produces more pollen, the air around a Vileplume turns yellow with the powder as it walks. The pollen is highly toxic and causes paralysis.

name: Paras
pokedex: A Paras has parasitic tochukaso mushrooms growing on its back. They grow by drawing nutrients from the host. They are valued as a medicine for long life.

name: Parasect
pokedex: Parasect are known to infest the roots of large trees en masse and drain nutrients. When an infested tree dies, they move onto another tree all at once.

name: Venonat
pokedex: En la naturaleza se alimenta continuamente de la madera de distintos árboles hasta los meses de primavera, momento en el que evoluciona.

name: Venomoth
pokedex: Es de hábitos nocturnos y se siente muy atraído por la luz. Suelen aparearse en primavera y se reproducen a principios del verano.

name: Diglett
pokedex: Diglett are raised in most farms. The reason is simple--wherever they burrow, the soil is left perfectly tilled for growing delicious crops.

name: Dugtrio
pokedex: Because the triplets originally split from one body, they think exactly alike. They work cooperatively to burrow endlessly through the ground.

name: Meowth
pokedex: En comparación con otros felinos es muy activo, le encanta explorar y buscar objetos brillantes. No tolera la soledad y suele vivir en grupos.

name: Persian
pokedex: Antiguamente era la mascota de los aristócratas ibéricos debido a su elegancia. Hacen brillar la joya de su frente para llamar la atención.

name: Psyduck
pokedex: When its headache intensifies, it starts using strange powers. However, it has no recollection of its powers, so it always looks befuddled and bewildered.

name: Golduck
pokedex: A Golduck is an adept swimmer. It sometimes joins competitive swimmers in training. It uses psychic powers when its forehead shimmers with light.

name: Mankey
pokedex: When it starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it's a sure sign of anger. However, since this happens instantly, there is no time to flee.

name: Primeape
pokedex: When it becomes furious, its blood circulation becomes more robust, and its muscles are made stronger. But it also becomes much less intelligent.

name: Growlithe
pokedex: Its superb sense of smell ensures that this Pokémon won't forget any scent, no matter what. It uses its sense of smell to detect the emotions of others.

name: Arcanine
pokedex: This fleet-footed Pokémon is said to run over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within its body is its source of power.

name: Poliwag
pokedex: It is possible to see this Pokémon's spiral innards right through its thin skin. However, the skin is also very flexible. Even sharp fangs bounce right off it.

name: Poliwhirl
pokedex: Its body surface is always wet and slick with an oily fluid. Because of this greasy covering, it can easily slip and slide out of the clutches of any enemy in battle.

name: Poliwrath
pokedex: Its highly developed muscles never grow fatigued, however much it exercises. This Pokémon can swim back and forth across the Pacific Ocean without effort.

name: Abra
pokedex: A Pokémon that sleeps 18 hours a day. Observation revealed that it uses Teleport to change its location once every hour.

name: Kadabra
pokedex: It is rumored that a boy with psychic abilities suddenly transformed into Kadabra while he was assisting research into extrasensory powers.

name: Alakazam
pokedex: While it has strong psychic abilities and high intelligence, an Alakazam's muscles are very weak. It uses psychic power to move its body.

name: Machop
pokedex: It continually undertakes strenuous training to master all forms of martial arts. Its strength lets it easily hoist a sumo wrestler onto its shoulders.

name: Machoke
pokedex: A belt is worn by a Machoke to keep its overwhelming power under control. Because it is so dangerous, no one has ever removed the belt.

name: Machamp
pokedex: It is impossible to defend against punches and chops doled out by its four arms. Its fighting spirit flares up when it faces a tough opponent.

name: Bellsprout
pokedex: A Bellsprout's thin and flexible body lets it bend and sway to avoid any attack, however strong it may be. From its mouth, it leaks a fluid that melts even iron.

name: Weepinbell
pokedex: At night, a Weepinbell hangs on to a tree branch with its hooked rear and sleeps. If it moves around in its sleep, it may wake up to find itself on the ground.

name: Victreebel
pokedex: The long vine extending from its head is waved about as if it were a living thing to attract prey. When an unsuspecting victim approaches, it is swallowed whole.

name: Tentacool
pokedex: Its body is almost entirely composed of water. It ensnares its foe with its two long tentacles, then stabs with the poison stingers at their tips.

name: Tentacruel
pokedex: It lives in complex rock formations on the ocean floor and traps prey using its 80 tentacles. Its red orbs glow when it grows excited or agitated.

name: Geodude
pokedex: It climbs mountain paths using only the power of its arms. Because they look just like boulders lining paths, hikers may step on them without noticing.

name: Graveler
pokedex: They descend from mountains by tumbling down steep slopes. They are so brutal, they smash aside obstructing trees and massive boulders with thunderous tackles.

name: Golem
pokedex: It is said to live in volcanic craters on mountain peaks. Once a year, it sheds its hide and grows larger. The shed hide crumbles and returns to the soil.

name: Ponyta
pokedex: A Ponyta is very weak at birth. It can barely stand up. Its legs become stronger as it stumbles and falls while trying to keep up with its parent.

name: Rapidash
pokedex: It usually canters casually in the fields and plains. But once a Rapidash turns serious, its fiery manes flare and blaze as it gallops its way up to 150 mph.

name: Slowpoke
pokedex: It catches prey by dipping its tail in water at the side of a river. But it often forgets what it is doing and spends entire days just loafing at water's edge.

name: Slowbro
pokedex: Its tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can't be used for fishing anymore. This forces it to reluctantly swim and catch prey.

name: Magnemite
pokedex: The units at its sides are extremely powerful magnets. They generate enough magnetism to draw in iron objects from over 300 feet away.

name: Magneton
pokedex: It is actually three Magnemite linked by magnetism. It generates powerful radio waves that raise temperatures by 3.6 degrees F within a 3,300-foot radius.

name: Farfetch'd
pokedex: It is always seen with a stick from a plant. Apparently, there are good sticks and bad sticks. This Pokémon occasionally fights with others over choice sticks.

name: Doduo
pokedex: Even while eating or sleeping, one of the heads remains always vigilant for any sign of danger. When threatened, it flees at over 60 miles per hour.

name: Dodrio
pokedex: A peculiar Pokémon species with three heads. It vigorously races across grassy plains even in arid seasons with little rainfall.

name: Seel
pokedex: Seel hunt for prey in frigid, ice-covered seas. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.

name: Dewgong
pokedex: It loves to snooze on bitterly cold ice. The sight of this Pokémon sleeping on a glacier was mistakenly thought to be a mermaid by a mariner long ago.

name: Grimer
pokedex: Born from polluted sludge in the sea, Grimer's favorite food is anything filthy. They feed on wastewater pumped out from factories.

name: Muk
pokedex: It prefers warm and humid habitats. In the summertime, the toxic substances in its body intensify, making Muk reek like putrid kitchen garbage.

name: Shellder
pokedex: At night, it burrows a hole in the seafloor with its broad tongue to make a place to sleep. While asleep, it closes its shell, but leaves its tongue hanging out.

name: Cloyster
pokedex: It swims in the sea by swallowing water, then jetting it out toward the rear. The Cloyster shoots spikes from its shell using the same system.

name: Gastly
pokedex: When exposed to a strong wind, a Gastly's gaseous body quickly dwindles away. They cluster under the eaves of houses to escape the ravages of wind.

name: Haunter
pokedex: If a Haunter beckons you while it is floating in darkness, don't approach it. This Pokémon will try to lick you with its tongue and steal your life away.

name: Gengar
pokedex: Deep in the night, your shadow cast by a streetlight may suddenly overtake you. It is actually a Gengar running past you, pretending to be your shadow.

name: Onix
pokedex: There is a magnet in its brain that prevents an Onix from losing direction while tunneling. As it grows older, its body becomes steadily rounder and smoother.

name: Drowzee
pokedex: If your nose becomes itchy while you are sleeping, it's a sure sign that a Drowzee is standing above your pillow and trying to eat your dream through your nostrils.

name: Hypno
pokedex: The arcing movement and glitter of the pendulum in a Hypno's hand lull the foe into deep hypnosis. While searching for prey, it polishes the pendulum.

name: Krabby
pokedex: Presenta un dimorfismo sexual claro, en el macho los surcos ventrales forman un triángulo isósceles y en la hembra un triángulo redondeado.

name: Kingler
pokedex: Muda su concha para crecer, si pierde su pinza grande la opuesta crece más convirtiéndose en la grande y regenera la otra que pasa a ser la pequeña.

name: Voltorb
pokedex: It bears an uncanny and unexplained resemblance to a Poké Ball. Because it explodes at the slightest shock, even veteran trainers treat it with caution.

name: Electrode
pokedex: They appear in great numbers at electric power plants. Because they feed on electricity, they cause massive and chaotic blackouts in nearby cities.

name: Exeggcute
pokedex: It consists of six eggs that care for each other. The eggs attract each other and spin around. When cracks increasingly appear, it is close to evolution.

name: Exeggutor
pokedex: Originally from the tropics, Exeggutor's heads grow larger from exposure to strong sunlight. It is said that when the heads fall, they group to form an Exeggcute.

name: Cubone
pokedex: Ha tenido que sobrevivir en un ecosistema inhóspito, como el desierto, desde muy pequeño sin su madre. Por ello es muy duro y autosuficiente.

name: Marowak
pokedex: Usan su hueso para producir sonidos golpeando rocas para avisar a otros de que están invadiendo su territorio o para impresionar a las hembras.

name: Hitmonlee
pokedex: Its legs freely stretch and contract. Using these springlike limbs, it bowls over foes with devastating kicks. After battle, it rubs down its tired legs.

name: Hitmonchan
pokedex: A Hitmonchan is said to possess the spirit of a boxer who aimed to become the world champion. Having an indomitable spirit means that it will never give up.

name: Lickitung
pokedex: Whenever it sees something unfamiliar, it always licks the object because it memorizes things by texture and taste. It is somewhat put off by sour things.

name: Koffing
pokedex: Getting up close to a Koffing will give you a chance to observe, through its thin skin, the toxic gases swirling inside. It blows up at the slightest stimulation.

name: Weezing
pokedex: By diluting its toxic gases with a special process, the highest grade of perfume can be extracted. To Weezing, gases emanating from garbage are the ultimate feast.

name: Rhyhorn
pokedex: Once it starts running, it doesn't stop. Its tiny brain makes it so stupid that it can't remember why it started running in the first place.

name: Rhydon
pokedex: Its horn, which rotates like a drill, destroys tall buildings with one strike. It stands on its hind legs, and its brain is well developed.

name: Chansey
pokedex: Chansey lay nutritionally excellent eggs every day. The eggs are so delicious, they are eagerly devoured by even those who have lost their appetite.

name: Tangela
pokedex: Su cuerpo está cubierto de enredaderas que lo protegen. Nadie sabe qué aspecto tiene sin ellas ya que le vuelven a crecer en segundos si se le arrancan.

name: Kangaskhan
pokedex: If you come across a young Kangaskhan playing by itself, never try to catch it. The baby's parent is sure to be in the area, and it will become violently enraged.

name: Horsea
pokedex: By cleverly flicking the fins on its back side to side, it moves in any direction while facing forward. It spits ink to escape if it senses danger.

name: Seadra
pokedex: The poisonous barbs all over its body are highly valued as ingredients for making traditional herbal medicine. It shows no mercy to anything approaching its nest.

name: Goldeen
pokedex: In the springtime, schools of Goldeen can be seen swimming up falls and rivers. It metes out staggering damage with its single horn.

name: Seaking
pokedex: It punches holes in boulders on stream- beds. This is a clever innovation that prevents its eggs from being attacked or washed away by the current.

name: Staryu
pokedex: It gathers with others in the night and makes its red core glow on and off with the twinkling stars. It can regenerate limbs if they are severed from its body.

name: Starmie
pokedex: People in ancient times imagined that Starmie were transformed from the reflections of stars that twinkled on gentle waves at night.

name: Mr. Mime
pokedex: A Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. It can convince others that something unseeable actually exists. Once believed, the imaginary object does become real.

name: Scyther
pokedex: Its blindingly fast speed adds to the sharpness of its twin forearm scythes. The scythes can slice through thick logs in one wicked stroke.

name: Jynx
pokedex: Fueron traídas de las Américas para servir en algunos espectáculos de la corte. Con el tiempo se fueron adaptando al arte del sur de Iberia.

name: Electabuzz
pokedex: When a storm approaches, it competes with others to scale heights that are likely to be stricken by lightning. Some towns use Electabuzz in place of lightning rods.

name: Magmar
pokedex: In battle, it blows out intense flames from all over its body to intimidate its foe. These fiery bursts create heat waves that ignite grass and trees in the area.

name: Pinsir
pokedex: Their pincers are strong enough to shatter thick logs. Because they dislike cold, Pinsir burrow and sleep under the ground on chilly nights.

name: Tauros
pokedex: It is not satisfied unless it is rampaging at all times. If there is no opponent for Tauros to battle, it will charge at thick trees and knock them down to calm itself.

name: Magikarp
pokedex: Its swimming muscles are weak, so it is easily washed away by currents. In places where water pools, you can see many Magikarp deposited there by the flow.

name: Gyarados
pokedex: It is an extremely vicious and violent Pokémon. When humans begin to fight, it will appear and burn everything to the ground with intensely hot flames.

name: Lapras
pokedex: People have driven Lapras almost to the point of extinction. In the evenings, it is said to sing plaintively as it seeks what few others of its kind still remain.

name: Ditto
pokedex: A Ditto rearranges its cell structure to transform itself. However, if it tries to change based on its memory, it will get details wrong.

name: Eevee
pokedex: Tiene mecanismos celulares que inducen la producción de mutaciones en el genoma cuando es expuesto a diferentes estímulos, como forma de adaptación.

name: Vaporeon
pokedex: Muy ágil en tierra firme y en el agua gracias a su aleta caudal. Además de pulmones posee branquias alrededor del cuello para respirar bajo agua.

name: Jolteon
pokedex: Se mueve a una velocidad vertiginosa, gracias a lo cual se carga de electricidad estática por el rozamiento con el aire, erizándose así su pelaje.

name: Flareon
pokedex: Es pacífico, calmado y muy suave. El calor que produce depende de su estado de ánimo, produciendo más si está enfadado o asustado.

name: Porygon
pokedex: It is capable of reverting itself entirely back to program data in order to enter cyberspace. A Porygon is copy- protected so it cannot be duplicated.

name: Omanyte
pokedex: One of the ancient and long-since-extinct Pokémon that have been regenerated from fossils by humans. If attacked, it withdraws into its hard shell.

name: Omastar
pokedex: An Omastar uses its tentacles to capture its prey. It is believed to have become extinct because its shell grew too large, making its movements slow and ponderous.

name: Kabuto
pokedex: It is a Pokémon that has been regenerated from a fossil. However, in rare cases, living examples have been discovered. Kabuto have not changed for 300 million years.

name: Kabutops
pokedex: Kabutops once swam underwater to hunt for prey. It was apparently evolving from being a water dweller to living on land as evident from changes in its gills and legs.

name: Aerodactyl
pokedex: Aerodactyl is a Pokémon from the age of dinosaurs. It was regenerated from DNA extracted from amber. It is imagined to have been the king of the skies.

name: Snorlax
pokedex: Snorlax's typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its big belly as a place to play.

name: Articuno
pokedex: Articuno is a legendary bird Pokémon that can control ice. The flapping of its wings chills the air. As a result, it is said that when this Pokémon flies, snow will fall.

name: Zapdos
pokedex: Zapdos is a legendary bird Pokémon that has the ability to control electricity. It usually lives in thunderclouds. It gains power if it is stricken by lightning bolts.

name: Moltres
pokedex: Moltres is a legendary bird Pokémon that can control fire. If injured, it is said to dip its body in the molten magma of a volcano to burn and heal itself.

name: Dratini
pokedex: A Dratini continually molts and sloughs off its old skin. It does so because the life energy within its body steadily builds to reach uncontrollable levels.

name: Dragonair
pokedex: A Dragonair stores an enormous amount of energy inside its body. It is said to alter the weather around it by loosing energy from the crystals on its neck and tail.

name: Dragonite
pokedex: It can circle the globe in just 16 hours. It is a kindhearted Pokémon that leads lost and foundering ships in a storm to the safety of land.

name: Mewtwo
pokedex: A Pokémon that was created by genetic manipulation. However, even though the scientific power of humans made its body, they failed to give it a warm heart.

name: Mew
pokedex: A Mew is said to possess the genes of all Pokémon. It is capable of making itself invisible at will, so it entirely avoids notice even if it approaches people.

name: Chikorita
pokedex: It waves its leaf around to keep foes at bay. However, a sweet fragrance also wafts from the leaf, creating a friendly atmosphere that becalms the battlers.

name: Bayleef
pokedex: A Bayleef's neck is ringed by curled-up leaves. Inside each leaf is a small tree shoot. The fragrance of this shoot makes people peppy.

name: Meganium
pokedex: The fragrance of a Meganium's flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, it gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe's fighting spirit.

name: Cyndaquil
pokedex: It flares flames from its back to protect itself. The fire burns vigorously if the Pokémon is angry. When it is tired, it sputters with incomplete combustion.

name: Quilava
pokedex: It intimidates foes with intense gusts of flames and superheated air. Its quick nimbleness lets it dodge attacks even while scorching an enemy.

name: Typhlosion
pokedex: It can hide behind a shimmering heat haze that it creates using its intense flames. Typhlosion create blazing explosive blasts that burn everything to cinders.

name: Totodile
pokedex: Despite its small body, Totodile's jaws are very powerful. While it may think it is just playfully nipping, its bite has enough strength to cause serious injury.

name: Croconaw
pokedex: Once its jaws clamp down on its foe, it will absolutely not let go. Because the tips of its fangs are forked back like fishhooks, they become irremovably embedded.

name: Feraligatr
pokedex: It opens its huge mouth to intimidate enemies. In battle, it runs using its thick and powerful hind legs to charge the foe with incredible speed.

name: Sentret
pokedex: They take turns standing guard when it is time to sleep. The sentry awakens the others if it senses danger. If one becomes separated, it turns sleepless with fear.

name: Furret
pokedex: A Furret has a very slim build. When under attack, it can squirm through narrow spaces and get away. In spite of its short limbs, it is very nimble and fleet.

name: Hoothoot
pokedex: It has an internal organ that senses the earth's rotation. Using this special organ, a Hoothoot begins hooting at precisely the same time every day.

name: Noctowl
pokedex: It unfailingly catches prey in darkness. Noctowl owe their success to superior vision that allows them to see in minimal light, and to their supple and silent wings.

name: Ledyba
pokedex: Ledyba communicate using a fluid that they secrete from where the legs join the body. They are said to convey feelings to others by altering the fluid's scent.

name: Ledian
pokedex: It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live many Ledian. For good reason, they use the light of the stars as energy.

name: Spinarak
pokedex: The web it spins can be considered its second nervous system. It is said that a Spinarak determines its prey by the tiny vibrations it feels through the web.

name: Ariados
pokedex: Its feet are tipped with tiny hooked claws that enable it to scuttle on ceilings and vertical walls. It constricts its foe with thin and strong silk webbing.

name: Crobat
pokedex: Over the course of evolution, its hind legs turned into wings. By alternately resting its front and rear wings, it can fly all day without having to stop.

name: Chinchou
pokedex: When it senses danger, it discharges positive and negative electricity from its two antennae. It lives in depths beyond sunlight's reach.

name: Lanturn
pokedex: The light-emitting orbs on its back are very bright. They are formed from a part of its dorsal fin. This Pokémon illuminates the inky darkness of deep seas.

name: Pichu
pokedex: It is still inept at retaining electricity. When it is startled, it discharges power accidentally. It gets better at holding power as it grows older.

name: Cleffa
pokedex: On nights with many shooting stars, Cleffa can be seen dancing in a ring. They dance until daybreak, when they quench their thirst with the morning dew.

name: Igglybuff
pokedex: Le gusta mucho cantar y cuida muy bien la salud de su garganta. Si tropieza empezará a rebotar como un balón de playa y le costará parar.

name: Togepi
pokedex: As its energy, it uses the feelings of compassion and pleasure exuded by people and Pokémon. It stores up happy feelings in its shell, then shares them out.

name: Togetic
pokedex: It is said to be a Pokémon that brings good fortune. When it spots someone who is pure of heart, a Togetic appears and shares its happiness with that person.

name: Natu
pokedex: It runs up short trees that grow on the savanna to peck at new shoots. A Natu's eyes look as if they are always observing something.

name: Xatu
pokedex: It has the enigmatic power of foreseeing the future. Some people in different lands have long believed that Xatu are emissaries from another world.

name: Mareep
pokedex: Its fluffy wool rubs together and builds a static charge. The more energy is charged, the more brightly the lightbulb at the tip of its tail glows.

name: Flaaffy
pokedex: Its fleece quality changes to generate strong static electricity with a small amount of wool. The bare, slick parts of its hide are shielded against electricity.

name: Ampharos
pokedex: It gives off so much light that it can be seen even from space. People in the old days used its light to send signals back and forth with others far away.

name: Bellossom
pokedex: Its flower petals deepen in color through exposure to sunlight. When cloudy weather persists, it does a dance that is thought to be a ritual for summoning the sun.

name: Marill
pokedex: Its body is covered with water-repellent fur. Because of the fur, it can swim through water at high speed without being slowed by the water's resistance.

name: Azumarill
pokedex: It lives in water virtually all day long. Its body color and pattern act as camouflage that makes it tough for enemies to spot in water.

name: Sudowoodo
pokedex: It mimics a tree to avoid being attacked by enemies. But since its forelegs remain green throughout the year, it is easily identified as a fake in the winter.

name: Politoed
pokedex: The curled hair on its head proves its status as a king. It is said that the longer and curlier the hair, the more respect it earns from its peers.

name: Hoppip
pokedex: This Pokémon drifts and floats with the wind. If it senses the approach of strong winds, a Hoppip links leaves with others to prepare against being blown away.

name: Skiploom
pokedex: It blossoms when the temperature rises above 64 degrees F. Because its flower's blooming changes with the temperature, it is sometimes used as a thermometer.

name: Jumpluff
pokedex: Jumpluff ride warm southern winds to cross the sea and fly to foreign lands. This Pokémon lands when it encounters cold air while it is floating.

name: Aipom
pokedex: Its tail ends with a dexterous, handlike appendage. However, because it uses the tail so much, Aipom's real hands have become rather clumsy.

name: Sunkern
pokedex: Sunkern try to minimize movement to conserve the nutrients they have stored in their bodies for evolution. They will not eat, subsisting only on morning dew.

name: Sunflora
pokedex: Sunflora convert solar energy into nutrition. They are highly active in the warm daytime but suddenly stop moving as soon as the sun sets.

name: Yanma
pokedex: It can see 360 degrees without moving its eyes. It is a great flier capable of making sudden stops and turning midair to quickly chase down targeted prey.

name: Wooper
pokedex: Wooper usually live in water but come out onto land seeking food occasionally. On land, they coat their bodies with a gooey, toxic film.

name: Quagsire
pokedex: A Quagsire hunts by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in. Because it doesn't move, it does not get very hungry.

name: Espeon
pokedex: Su cola bífida le sirve para apoyarse y caminar a 2 patas o llegar más alto. Desarrolla grandes poderes psíquicos que potencia con la gema de su frente.

name: Umbreon
pokedex: Está completamente adaptado a la vida nocturna, pudiendo ver incluso mejor de noche que de día. Puede ocultarse perfectamente en la oscuridad.

name: Murkrow
pokedex: Murkrow were feared as the alleged bearers of ill fortune. It shows strong interest in anything that sparkles. It will even try to steal rings from women.

name: Slowking
pokedex: It undertakes research every day to solve the mysteries of the world. However, it apparently forgets everything if the Shellder on its head comes off.

name: Misdreavus
pokedex: A Misdreavus frightens people with a creepy, sobbing cry. It apparently uses its red spheres to absorb the fear of foes as its nutrition.

name: Unown
pokedex: This Pokémon is shaped like ancient text characters. Although research is ongoing, it is a mystery as to which came first, the ancient writings or the various Unown.

name: Wobbuffet
pokedex: Usually docile, a Wobbuffet strikes back ferociously if its black tail is attacked. It makes its lair in caves where it waits for nightfall.

name: Girafarig
pokedex: A Girafarig is an herbivore--it eats grass and tree shoots. While it is eating, its tail makes chewing and swallowing motions as if it were also eating.

name: Pineco
pokedex: A Pineco hangs from a tree branch and waits for prey. While eating, if it is disturbed by someone shaking its tree, it falls on the ground and suddenly explodes.

name: Forretress
pokedex: It keeps itself inside its steel shell. The shell is opened when it is catching prey, but it is so quick that the shell's inside cannot be seen.

name: Dunsparce
pokedex: Its drill-tipped tail is used to burrow into the ground backwards. This Pokémon is known to make its nest in complex shapes deep under the ground.

name: Gligar
pokedex: It glides without making a single sound. It grasps the face of its foe using its hind and large front claws, then stabs with its poison barb.

name: Steelix
pokedex: Steelix live even further underground than Onix. This Pokémon is known to dig toward the earth's core, reaching a depth of over six-tenths of a mile underground.

name: Snubbull
pokedex: By baring its fangs and making a scary face, it sends smaller Pokémon scurrying in terror. The Snubbull does seem a little sad at making its foes flee.

name: Granbull
pokedex: It has a particularly well-developed lower jaw. The huge fangs are heavy, causing it to tilt its head. Unless it is startled, it will not try to bite.

name: Qwilfish
pokedex: A Qwilfish uses the pressure of water it swallows to shoot toxic quills all at once from all over its body. It finds swimming to be somewhat challenging.

name: Scizor
pokedex: A Scizor has a body with the hardness of steel. It is not easily fazed by ordinary sorts of attacks. It flaps its wings to regulate its body temperature.

name: Shuckle
pokedex: A Shuckle hides under rocks, keeping its body concealed inside its shell while eating stored berries. The berries mix with its body fluids to become a juice.

name: Heracross
pokedex: They gather in forests seeking the sweet sap of trees. It is completely clad in a steel-hard shell. It is proud of its horn, which it uses to fling foes.

name: Sneasel
pokedex: A Sneasel scales trees by punching its hooked claws into the bark. It seeks out unguarded nests and steals eggs for food while the parents are away.

name: Teddiursa
pokedex: It licks its palms that are sweetened by being soaked in honey. A Teddiursa makes its own honey by blending fruits and pollen collected by Beedrill.

name: Ursaring
pokedex: In forests, it is said that there are many streams and towering trees where an Ursaring gathers food. It walks through its forest collecting food every day.

name: Slugma
pokedex: It is a species of Pokémon that lives in volcanic areas. If its body cools, its skin hardens and immobilizes it. To avoid that, it sleeps near magma.

name: Magcargo
pokedex: The shell on its back is made of hardened magma. Tens of thousands of years spent living in volcanic craters have turned Magcargo's bodies into magma.

name: Swinub
pokedex: It roots for food by rubbing its snout against the ground. Its favorite food is a mushroom that grows under dried grass. It occasionally roots out hot springs.

name: Piloswine
pokedex: A Piloswine is covered by a thick coat of long hair for enduring freezing cold. It uses its tusks to dig up food that has been buried under ice.

name: Corsola
pokedex: Corsola live in warm southern seas. If the sea becomes polluted, the beautiful coral stalks become discolored and crumble away in tatters.

name: Remoraid
pokedex: A Remoraid uses its abdominal muscles to forcefully expel swallowed water, then shoot down flying prey. When evolution approaches, it travels down rivers.

name: Octillery
pokedex: It ensnares its foe with its suction- cupped tentacles before delivering the finishing blow. If the foe turns out to be too strong, it spews ink to escape.

name: Delibird
pokedex: It carries food bundled up in its tail. There was a famous explorer who managed to scale Mt. Everest thanks to a Delibird sharing its food.

name: Mantine
pokedex: On sunny days, schools of Mantine can be seen elegantly leaping over the waves. It is not bothered by the Remoraid that hitches rides.

name: Skarmory
pokedex: A Pokémon that has a body and wings of steel. People in the past used feathers fallen from Skarmory to make swords and knives.

name: Houndour
pokedex: Houndour communicate with each other using a variety of cries to corner their prey. This Pokémon's remarkable teamwork is simply unparalleled.

name: Houndoom
pokedex: In a Houndoom pack, the one with its horns raked sharply back serves a leadership role. They choose their leader by fighting among themselves.

name: Kingdra
pokedex: It sleeps quietly, deep on the seafloor. When it comes up to the surface, it creates a huge whirlpool that can swallow even ships.

name: Phanpy
pokedex: Phanpy's big ears serve as broad fans. When it becomes hot, it flaps the ears busily to cool down. Even the young are very strong.

name: Donphan
pokedex: A Donphan is so strong it can easily haul a dump truck. Its hide has toughened to a rock-hard state. An ordinary sort of attack won't even leave a scratch.

name: Porygon2
pokedex: It was created by humans using the power of science. It has been given artificial intelligence that enables it to learn new gestures and emotions on its own.

name: Stantler
pokedex: Stantler's magnificent antlers were once traded at high prices as works of art. As a result, this Pokémon was hunted close to extinction.

name: Smeargle
pokedex: Es un artista nato, todos los grandes pintores de la historia de Iberia han tenido uno como compañero que les ayudaba a crear sus obras de arte.

name: Tyrogue
pokedex: Tyrogue become stressed out if they do not get to train every day. When raising this Pokémon, the trainer must establish a regular training schedule.

name: Hitmontop
pokedex: Its technique of kicking while spinning is a remarkable mix of both offense and defense. Hitmontop travel faster spinning than they do walking.

name: Smoochum
pokedex: Es muy presumida y desde pequeña aprende el arte del coqueteo para llamar la atención y conseguir lo que quiere mostrándose adorable.

name: Elekid
pokedex: If it touches metal and discharges the electricity it has stored in its body, an Elekid begins swinging its arms in circles to recharge itself.

name: Magby
pokedex: If a Magby is spouting yellow flames from its mouth, it is in good health. When it is fatigued, black smoke will be mixed in with the flames.

name: Miltank
pokedex: It gives over five gallons of milk daily. Its sweet milk is enjoyed by children and grown-ups alike. People who can't drink milk turn it into yogurt and eat it instead.

name: Blissey
pokedex: If it senses sadness with its fluffy fur, a Blissey will rush over to the sad person, however far away, to share an egg of happiness that brings a smile to any face.

name: Raikou
pokedex: Raikou embodies the speed of lightning. Its roars send shock waves shuddering through the air and ground as if lightning bolts were crashing down.

name: Entei
pokedex: Entei embodies the passion of magma. It is thought to have been born in the eruption of a volcano. It blasts fire that consumes all that it touches.

name: Suicune
pokedex: Suicune embodies the compassion of a pure spring of water. It runs across the land with gliding elegance. It has the power to purify dirty water.

name: Larvitar
pokedex: A Larvitar is born deep under the ground. It must eat its way through the soil above and reach the surface for it to see its parents' faces.

name: Pupitar
pokedex: A Pupitar creates a gas inside its body that it ejects under compression to propel itself like a jet. Its body can withstand a collision with solid steel.

name: Tyranitar
pokedex: A Tyranitar is so overwhelmingly powerful, it can bring down a whole mountain to make its nest. It roams in mountains seeking new opponents to fight.

name: Lugia
pokedex: Lugia is so powerful even a light fluttering of its wings can blow apart houses. As a result, it chooses to live out of sight deep under the sea.

name: Ho-Oh
pokedex: Its feathers--which glow in seven colors depending on the angle at which they are struck by light--are thought to bring joy. It is said to live at the foot of a rainbow.

name: Celebi
pokedex: This Pokémon came from the future by crossing over time. It is thought that so long as Celebi appears, a bright and shining future awaits us.

name: Treecko
pokedex: It makes its nest in a giant tree in the forest. It ferociously guards against anything nearing its territory. It is said to be the protector of the forest's trees.

name: Grovyle
pokedex: Leaves grow out of this Pokémon's body. They help obscure a Grovyle from the eyes of its enemies while it is in a thickly overgrown forest.

name: Sceptile
pokedex: In the jungle, its power is without equal. This Pokémon carefully grows trees and plants. It regulates its body temperature by basking in sunlight.

name: Torchic
pokedex: If attacked, it strikes back by spitting balls of fire it forms in its stomach. A Torchic dislikes darkness because it can't see its surroundings.

name: Combusken
pokedex: It lashes out with 10 kicks per second. Its strong fighting instinct compels it to keep up its offensive until the opponent gives up.

name: Blaziken
pokedex: It learns martial arts that use punches and kicks. Every several years, its old feathers burn off, and new, supple feathers grow back in their place.

name: Mudkip
pokedex: On land, it can powerfully lift large boulders by planting its four feet and heaving. It sleeps by burying itself in soil at the water's edge.

name: Marshtomp
pokedex: Its toughened hind legs enable it to stand upright. Because it weakens if its skin dries out, it replenishes fluids by playing in mud.

name: Swampert
pokedex: If it senses the approach of a storm and a tidal wave, it protects its seaside nest by piling up boulders. It swims as fast as a jet ski.

name: Poochyena
pokedex: It savagely threatens foes with bared fangs. It chases after fleeing targets tenaciously. It turns tail and runs, however, if the foe strikes back.

name: Mightyena
pokedex: In the wild, Mightyena live in a pack. They never defy their leader's orders. They defeat foes with perfectly coordinated teamwork.

name: Zigzagoon
pokedex: Rubbing its nose against the ground, it always wanders about back and forth in search of something. It is distinguished by the zigzag footprints it leaves.

name: Linoone
pokedex: It is exceedingly fast if it only has to run in a straight line. When it spots pond- dwelling prey underwater, it quickly leaps in and catches it with its sharp claws.

name: Wurmple
pokedex: It sticks to tree branches and eats leaves. The thread it spits from its mouth, which becomes gooey when it touches air, slows the movement of its foes.

name: Silcoon
pokedex: It prepares for evolution using the energy it stored while it was a Wurmple. It keeps watch over the surroundings with its two eyes.

name: Beautifly
pokedex: Its colorfully patterned wings are its most prominent feature. It flies through flower-covered fields collecting pollen. It attacks ferociously when angered.

name: Cascoon
pokedex: To avoid detection by its enemies, it hides motionlessly beneath large leaves and in the gaps of branches. It also attaches dead leaves to its body for camouflage.

name: Dustox
pokedex: It is a nocturnal Pokémon that flies from fields and mountains to the attraction of streetlights at night. It looses highly toxic powder from its wings.

name: Lotad
pokedex: This Pokémon lives in ponds with clean water. It is known to ferry small Pokémon across ponds by carrying them on the broad leaf on its head.

name: Lombre
pokedex: In the evening, it takes great delight in popping out of rivers and startling people. It feeds on aquatic moss that grows on rocks in the riverbed.

name: Ludicolo
pokedex: When it hears festive music, all the cells in its body become stimulated, and it begins moving in rhythm. It does not quail even when it faces a tough opponent.

name: Seedot
pokedex: Es presa de varios Pokémon por lo que suelen colgarse de árboles y ocultarse entre las hojas para absorber la savia elaborada sin peligro.

name: Nuzleaf
pokedex: Usa la hoja de su cabeza para soplar y realizar sonidos diversos que le sirven para comunicarse entre ellos, confundir a sus enemigos, etc.

name: Shiftry
pokedex: Lidera grupos de Nuzleaf y se preocupa por sus compañeros. Puede usar los abanicos de sus brazos para planear o provocar fuertes vientos.

name: Taillow
pokedex: Although it is small, it is very courageous. It will take on a larger Skarmory on an equal footing. However, its will weakens if it becomes hungry.

name: Swellow
pokedex: A Swellow dives upon prey from far above. It never misses its targets. It takes to the skies in search of lands with a warm climate.

name: Wingull
pokedex: It makes its nest on a sheer cliff at the edge of the sea. It has trouble keeping its wings flapping in flight. Instead, it soars on updrafts.

name: Pelipper
pokedex: It skims the tops of waves as it flies. When it spots prey, it uses its large beak to scoop up the victim with water. It protects its eggs in its beak.

name: Ralts
pokedex: A Ralts has the power to sense the emotions of people and Pokémon with the horns on its head. It takes cover if it senses any hostility.

name: Kirlia
pokedex: A Kirlia has the psychic power to create a rip in the dimensions and see into the future. It is said to dance with pleasure on sunny mornings.

name: Gardevoir
pokedex: It apparently does not feel the pull of gravity because it supports itself with psychic power. It will give its life to protect its trainer.

name: Surskit
pokedex: They gather on puddles after evening downpours, gliding across the surface of water as if sliding. It secretes honey with a sweet aroma from its head.

name: Masquerain
pokedex: It intimidates foes with the large eyelike patterns on its antennae. Because it can't fly if its wings get wet, it shelters itself from rain under large trees and eaves.

name: Shroomish
pokedex: It loves to eat damp, composted soil in forests. If you enter a forest after a long rain, you can see many Shroomish feasting on composted soil.

name: Breloom
pokedex: It scatters spores from holes in the cap on its head. It loves warm and humid climates. It feeds on trees and plants in fields and forests.

name: Slakoth
pokedex: It sleeps virtually all day and night long. It doesn't change its nest its entire life, but it sometimes travels great distances by swimming in rivers.

name: Vigoroth
pokedex: It can't keep still because its blood boils with energy. It runs through the fields and mountains all day to calm itself. If it doesn't, it can't sleep at night.

name: Slaking
pokedex: Hordes of Slaking gather around trees when fruits come into season. They wait around patiently for ripened fruits to fall out of the trees.

name: Nincada
pokedex: It makes its nest at the roots of a mighty tree. Using its whiskerlike antennae, it probes its surroundings in the pitch-black darkness of soil.

name: Ninjask
pokedex: Because it darts about vigorously at high speed, it is very difficult to see. Hearing its distinctive cries for too long induces a headache.

name: Shedinja
pokedex: A peculiar Pokémon that floats in air even though its wings remain completely still. The inside of its body is hollow and utterly dark.

name: Whismur
pokedex: Its cries equal a jet plane in volume. It inhales through its ear canals. Because of this system, it can cry continually without having to catch its breath.

name: Loudred
pokedex: It positions the round speakers on its head to assail foes with ultrasonic waves at massive volume. It builds power by stomping the ground.

name: Exploud
pokedex: It has sound-generating organs all over its body. It communicates with others by adjusting the tone and volume of the cries it emits.

name: Makuhita
pokedex: It loves to toughen up its body above all else. If you hear quaking rumbles in a cave, it is the sound of Makuhita undertaking strenuous training.

name: Hariyama
pokedex: It has the habit of challenging others without hesitation to tests of strength. It's been known to stand on train tracks and stop trains using forearm thrusts.

name: Azurill
pokedex: Its tail, which is packed with nutrition, is very bouncy like a rubber ball. On sunny days they gather at the edge of water and splash about for fun.

name: Nosepass
pokedex: Its body emits a powerful magnetism. It feeds on prey that is pulled in by the force. Its magnetism is stronger in cold seasons.

name: Skitty
pokedex: A Skitty's adorably cute behavior makes it highly popular. In battle, it makes its tail puff out. It threatens foes with a sharp growl.

name: Delcatty
pokedex: Rather than keeping a permanent lair, it habitually seeks comfortable spots and sleeps there. It is nocturnal and becomes active at dusk.

name: Sableye
pokedex: It digs branching holes in caves using its sharp claws in search of food--raw gems. A Sableye lurks in darkness and is seen only rarely.

name: Mawile
pokedex: Its giant jaws are actually steel horns that transformed. It fools foes into complacency with its adorable gestures, then chomps them with its huge jaws.

name: Aron
pokedex: A Pokémon that is clad in steel armor. A new suit of armor is made when it evolves. The old, discarded armor is salvaged as metal for making iron products.

name: Lairon
pokedex: When two Lairon meet in the wild, they fight for territory by bashing into each other with their steel bodies. The sound of their collision carries for miles.

name: Aggron
pokedex: Its iron horns grow longer a little at a time. They are used to determine the Aggron's age. The gouges in its armor are worn with pride as mementos from battles.

name: Meditite
pokedex: It continually meditates for hours every day. As a result of rigorous and dedicated yoga training, it has tempered its spiritual power so much it can fly.

name: Medicham
pokedex: Through crushingly harsh yoga training, it gained the power to foretell its foe's actions. It battles with elegant, dance- like movement.

name: Electrike
pokedex: It generates electricity using friction from the atmosphere. In seasons with especially arid air, its entire body blazes with violent showers of sparks.

name: Manectric
pokedex: Because lightning falls in their vicinities, Manectric were thought to have been born from lightning. In battle, they create thunderclouds.

name: Plusle
pokedex: It has the trait of cheering on its fellow Pokémon. By shorting out the electricity it releases from its paws, it creates pom-poms for cheering.

name: Minun
pokedex: At a meeting of Pokémon academics, it was announced that simultaneous exposure to electricity from a Plusle and Minun will promote circulation and boost vitality.

name: Volbeat
pokedex: With their taillights lit, Volbeat fly in a swarm, drawing geometric designs in the night sky. They move their nests if their pond water becomes dirty.

name: Illumise
pokedex: A nocturnal Pokémon that becomes active upon nightfall. It leads a Volbeat swarm to draw patterns in the night sky. Over 200 different patterns have been confirmed.

name: Roselia
pokedex: A Roselia that drinks nutritionally rich springwater blooms with lovely flowers. The fragrance of its flowers has the effect of making its foes careless.

name: Gulpin
pokedex: This Pokémon's stomach fluid can even digest scrap iron. In one gulp, it can swallow something that is as large as itself.

name: Swalot
pokedex: Its powerful stomach acid is capable of digesting almost anything. The one thing in the whole world a Swalot can't digest is its own stomach.

name: Carvanha
pokedex: Carvanha attack ships in swarms, making them sink. Although it is said to be a very vicious Pokémon, it timidly flees as soon as it finds itself alone.

name: Sharpedo
pokedex: The vicious and sly gangster of the sea. Its skin is specially textured to minimize drag in water. Its speed tops out at over 75 miles per hour.

name: Wailmer
pokedex: While this Pokémon usually lives in the sea, it can survive on land, although not too long. It loses vitality if its body becomes dried out.

name: Wailord
pokedex: It breathes through nostrils that it raises above the sea. By inhaling to its maximum capacity, a Wailord can dive close to 10,000 feet beneath the waves.

name: Numel
pokedex: En las plantas de las patas tiene callosidades para resistir el calor del suelo. En la joroba guardan grasa que estalla para atacar al calentarse.

name: Camerupt
pokedex: Es pacífico pero se irrita rápido, si se le molesta escupe magma. Puede guardar grasa en sus jorobas y alimentarse de ella durante 10 días.

name: Torkoal
pokedex: It battles using energy it gets from burning coal. When loosing smoke from its nostrils, it lets off a sound that is similar to a locomotive's horn.

name: Spoink
pokedex: A Pokémon that manipulates psychic power at will. It doesn't stop bouncing even when it is asleep. It loves eating mushrooms that grow underground.

name: Grumpig
pokedex: It stores power in the black pearls on its forehead. When it uses psychic power, it performs an odd dance step. Its style of dancing became hugely popular overseas.

name: Spinda
pokedex: It is distinguished by a pattern of spots that is always different. Its unsteady, tottering walk has the effect of fouling its foe's aim.

name: Trapinch
pokedex: Excava un hoyo en forma de embudo en cuyo fondo se esconde, sus presas al caer en él no pueden salir y terminan dentro de sus grandes mandíbulas.

name: Vibrava
pokedex: A pesar de disminuir el tamaño de su mandíbula, tiene mucha fuerza en ella. Son depredadores que cazan incluso Pokémon de su propia especie.

name: Flygon
pokedex: Se comunican a grandes distancias por medio de feromonas. Suelen esconder sus huevos ligeramente enterrados o entre la vegetación.

name: Cacnea
pokedex: Cacnea live in deserts with virtually no rainfall. It battles by swinging its thick, spiked arms. Once a year, a yellow flower blooms.

name: Cacturne
pokedex: After spending thousands of years in harsh deserts, its blood transformed into the same substances as sand. It is nocturnal, so it hunts at night.

name: Swablu
pokedex: Es uno de los Pokémon con migraciones más largas y mayores bandadas. Su cuerpo le permite viajar grandes distancias pasando inadvertido.

name: Altaria
pokedex: Le gustan los territorios cálidos y en los que pueda encontrar mucha fruta. Migra buscando esos territorios siendo el líder de las bandadas de Swablu.

name: Zangoose
pokedex: When it battles, it stands on its hind legs and attacks with its sharply clawed forelegs. Its fur bristles if it encounters any Seviper.

name: Seviper
pokedex: Seviper and Zangoose are eternal rivals. It counters a Zangoose's dazzling agility with its swordlike tail, which also oozes a horrible poison.

name: Lunatone
pokedex: It becomes very active on the night of a full moon. This Pokémon was first discovered 40 years ago at the site of a meteor strike.

name: Solrock
pokedex: Solar energy is the source of this Pokémon's power. On sunny days, groups of Solrock line up facing the sun and absorb its light.

name: Barboach
pokedex: Its body is covered with a slimy film. The film acts as a barrier to prevent germs in muddy water from entering the Barboach's body.

name: Whiscash
pokedex: Mysteriously, it can foretell earthquakes. In the daytime, it sleeps in mud at the bottom of a pond. When it awakens, it continually feeds throughout the night.

name: Corphish
pokedex: Once it grips prey with its large pincers, it will never let go, no matter what. It is a hardy Pokémon that can thrive in any environment.

name: Crawdaunt
pokedex: A brutish Pokémon that loves to battle. A veteran Crawdaunt that has prevailed in hundreds of battles has giant pincers marked with countless scars.

name: Baltoy
pokedex: A Baltoy moves by spinning on its single foot. It has been depicted in murals adorning the walls of a once-bustling city in an ancient age.

name: Claydol
pokedex: A Claydol sleeps while hovering in midair. Its arms are separate from its body. They are kept floating by the Pokémon's manipulation of psychic power.

name: Lileep
pokedex: It disguises itself as seaweed by making its tentacles sway. Unsuspecting prey that come too close are swallowed whole. It became extinct 100 million years ago.

name: Cradily
pokedex: It drags its heavy body along the seafloor. It makes its nest in the shallows of warm seas. Cradily can be seen on beaches when the tide goes out.

name: Anorith
pokedex: It was resurrected from a fossil using the power of science. It swims by undulating the eight wings at its sides. They were feet that adapted to life in the sea.

name: Armaldo
pokedex: Armaldo usually lives on land. However, when it hunts for prey, it dives beneath the ocean. It swims around using its two large wings.

name: Feebas
pokedex: Feebas live in ponds that are heavily infested with weeds. Because of its hopelessly shabby appearance, it seems as if few trainers raise it.

name: Milotic
pokedex: It is said to live at the bottom of large lakes. Considered to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon, it has been depicted in paintings and statues.

name: Castform
pokedex: It alters its form depending on the weather. Changes in the climate such as the temperature and humidity appear to affect its cellular structure.

name: Kecleon
pokedex: A Pokémon that has the ability to alter its body colors to match its surroundings. A Kecleon reverts to its original colors if it is startled.

name: Shuppet
pokedex: This Pokémon roams about deep in the night seeking such negative emotions as grudges and envy. It retreats to its nest when the sun begins to rise.

name: Banette
pokedex: An abandoned plush doll became this Pokémon. They are said to live in garbage dumps and wander about in search of the children that threw them away.

name: Duskull
pokedex: A glare from its single scarlet eye makes even burly grown-ups freeze in utter fear. It is a nocturnal Pokémon that roams about under the cloak of darkness.

name: Dusclops
pokedex: It is thought that its body is hollow with only a spectral ball of fire burning inside. However, no one has been able to confirm this theory as fact.

name: Tropius
pokedex: It flies by flapping its broad leaves. The bunch of fruit that grows around its neck is deliciously sweet. In the spring, it scatters pollen from its neck.

name: Chimecho
pokedex: They fly about very actively when the hot season arrives. They communicate among themselves using seven different and distinguishing cries.

name: Absol
pokedex: It sharply senses even subtle changes in the sky and the land to predict natural disasters. It is a long-lived Pokémon that has a life-span of 100 years.

name: Wynaut
pokedex: A Wynaut loves to eat sweet fruits. It cleverly picks fruits using its earlike arms. They gather in fruit gardens, drawn by the fragrance.

name: Snorunt
pokedex: Fueron introducidos en Iberia por los japoneses de Coria del Rio en 1614. Habita en zonas nevadas y usa un traje japonés tradicional de invierno.

name: Glalie
pokedex: Es un gran depredador adaptado a montañas nevadas y cuevas heladas, congela a sus presas antes de comérselas con su fuerte mandíbula.

name: Spheal
pokedex: It is completely covered with plushy fur. As a result, it never feels the cold even when it is rolling about on ice floes or diving in the sea.

name: Sealeo
pokedex: Sealeo live in herds on ice floes. Using its powerful flippers, it shatters ice. It dives into the sea to hunt prey five times a day.

name: Walrein
pokedex: To protect its herd, the leader battles anything that invades its territory, even at the cost of its life. Its tusks may snap off in battle.

name: Clamperl
pokedex: A Clamperl slams its shell closed on prey to prevent escape. The pearl it creates upon evolution is said to be infused with a mysterious energy.

name: Huntail
pokedex: To withstand the crushing pressure of water deep under the sea, its spine is very thick and sturdy. Its tail, which is shaped like a small fish, has eyes that light up.

name: Gorebyss
pokedex: A Gorebyss siphons the body fluids of prey through its thin, tubular mouth. Its light pink body color turns vivid when it finishes feeding.

name: Relicanth
pokedex: A Pokémon that was once believed to have been extinct. The species has not changed its form for 100 million years. It walks on the seafloor using its pectoral fins.

name: Luvdisc
pokedex: Luvdisc make the branches of Corsola their nests. There is a custom from long ago of giving a Luvdisc as a gift to express one's feelings of love.

name: Bagon
pokedex: Although it is small, this Pokémon is very powerful because its body is a bundle of muscles. It launches head-butts with its ironlike skull.

name: Shelgon
pokedex: It hardly eats while it awaits evolution. It becomes hardier by enduring hunger. Its shell peels off the instant it begins to evolve.

name: Salamence
pokedex: After many long years, its cellular structure underwent a sudden mutation to grow wings. When angered, it loses all thought and rampages out of control.

name: Beldum
pokedex: When Beldum gather in a swarm, they move in perfect unison as if they were but one Pokémon. They communicate with each other using brain waves.

name: Metang
pokedex: The claws tipping its arms pack the destructive power to tear through thick iron sheets as if they were silk. It flies at over 60 miles per hour.

name: Metagross
pokedex: Metagross has four brains that are joined by a complex neural network. As a result of integration, this Pokémon is smarter than a supercomputer.

name: Regirock
pokedex: A Pokémon that is made entirely of rocks and boulders. If parts of its body chip off in battle, Regirock repairs itself by adding new rocks.

name: Regice
pokedex: Its entire body is made of Antarctic ice. After extensive studies, researchers believe the ice was formed during an ice age.

name: Registeel
pokedex: Its body is harder than any other kind of metal. The body metal is composed of a mysterious substance. Not only is it hard, it shrinks and stretches flexibly.

name: Latias
pokedex: They make a small herd of only several members. They rarely make contact with people or other Pokémon. They disappear if they sense enemies.

name: Latios
pokedex: Even in hiding, it can detect the locations of others and sense their emotions since it has telepathy. Its intelligence allows it to understand human languages.

name: Kyogre
pokedex: Kyogre has appeared in mythology as the creator of the sea. After long years of feuding with Groudon, it took to sleep at the bottom of the sea.

name: Groudon
pokedex: Groudon has appeared in mythology as the creator of the land. It sleeps in magma underground and is said to make volcanoes erupt on awakening.

name: Rayquaza
pokedex: A Pokémon that flies endlessly in the ozone layer. It is said it would descend to the ground if Kyogre and Groudon were to fight.

name: Jirachi
pokedex: Jirachi is said to make wishes come true. While it sleeps, a tough crystalline shell envelops the body to protect it from enemies.

name: Deoxys
pokedex: A Pokémon that mutated from an extraterrestrial virus exposed to a laser beam. Its body is configured for superior agility and speed.

name: Turtwig
pokedex: Made from soil, the shell on its back hardens when it drinks water. It lives along lakes.

name: Grotle
pokedex: It lives along water in forests. In the daytime, it leaves the forest to sunbathe its treed shell.

name: Torterra
pokedex: Small Pokémon occasionally gather on its unmoving back to begin building their nests.

name: Chimchar
pokedex: It agilely scales sheer cliffs to live atop craggy mountains. Its fire is put out when it sleeps.

name: Monferno
pokedex: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.

name: Infernape
pokedex: It uses a special kind of martial arts involving all its limbs. Its fire never goes out.

name: Piplup
pokedex: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

name: Prinplup
pokedex: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

name: Empoleon
pokedex: The three horns that extend from its beak attest to its power. The leader has the biggest horns.

name: Starly
pokedex: They flock in great numbers. Though small, they flap their wings with great power.

name: Staravia
pokedex: It flies around forests and fields in search of bug Pokémon. It stays within a huge flock.

name: Staraptor
pokedex: It has a savage nature. It will courageously challenge foes that are much larger.

name: Bidoof
pokedex: With nerves of steel, nothing can perturb it. It is more agile and active than it appears.

name: Bibarel
pokedex: It makes its nest by damming streams with bark and mud. It is known as an industrious worker.

name: Kricketot
pokedex: It shakes its head back to front, causing its antennae to hit each other and sound like a xylophone.

name: Kricketune
pokedex: It crosses its knifelike arms in front of its chest when it cries. It can compose melodies ad lib.

name: Shinx
pokedex: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

name: Luxio
pokedex: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.

name: Luxray
pokedex: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.

name: Budew
pokedex: Over the winter, it closes its bud and endures the cold. In spring, the bud opens and releases pollen.

name: Roserade
pokedex: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.

name: Cranidos
pokedex: It lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its skull is as hard as iron.

name: Rampardos
pokedex: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

name: Shieldon
pokedex: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

name: Bastiodon
pokedex: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

name: Burmy
pokedex: To shelter itself from cold, wintry winds, it covers itself with a cloak made of twigs and leaves.

name: Wormadam
pokedex: When Burmy evolved, its cloak became a part of this Pokémon's body. The cloak is never shed.

name: Mothim
pokedex: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by Combee.

name: Combee
pokedex: A Pokémon formed by three others. It busily carries sweet floral honey to Vespiquen.

name: Vespiquen
pokedex: Its abdomen is a honeycomb for grubs. It raises its grubs on honey collected by Combee.

name: Pachirisu
pokedex: It makes fur balls that crackle with static electricity. It stores them with berries in tree holes.

name: Buizel
pokedex: It has a flotation sac that is like an inflatable collar. It floats on water with its head out.

name: Floatzel
pokedex: It floats using its well-developed flotation sac. It assists in the rescues of drowning people.

name: Cherubi
pokedex: The small ball holds the nutrients needed for evolution. Apparently, it is very sweet and tasty.

name: Cherrim
pokedex: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.

name: Shellos
pokedex: Its colors and shapes differ from region to region. In the Sinnoh region, two types are confirmed.

name: Gastrodon
pokedex: It has a pliable body without any bones. If any part of its body is torn off, it grows right back.

name: Ambipom
pokedex: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.

name: Drifloon
pokedex: A Pokémon formed by the spirits of people and Pokémon. It loves damp, humid seasons.

name: Drifblim
pokedex: It's drowzy in daytime, but flies off in the evening in big groups. No one knows where they go.

name: Buneary
pokedex: It slams foes by sharply uncoiling its rolled ears. It stings enough to make a grown-up cry in pain.

name: Lopunny
pokedex: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.

name: Mismagius
pokedex: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.

name: Honchkrow
pokedex: Becoming active at night, it is known to swarm with numerous Murkrow in tow.

name: Glameow
pokedex: It claws if displeased and purrs when affectionate. Its fickleness is very popular among some.

name: Purugly
pokedex: It is a brazen brute that barges its way into another Pokémon's nest and claims it as its own.

name: Chingling
pokedex: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.

name: Stunky
pokedex: It protects itself by spraying a noxious fluid from its rear. The stench lingers for 24 hours.

name: Skuntank
pokedex: It sprays a vile-smelling fluid from the tip of its tail to attack. Its range is over 160 feet.

name: Bronzor
pokedex: Implements shaped like it were discovered in ancient tombs. It is unknown if they are related.

name: Bronzong
pokedex: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

name: Bonsly
pokedex: It looks as if it is always crying. It is actually adjusting its body's fluid levels by eliminating excess.

name: Mime Jr.
pokedex: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.

name: Happiny
pokedex: It loves round white things. It carries an egg-shaped rock in imitation of Chansey.

name: Chatot
pokedex: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

name: Spiritomb
pokedex: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

name: Gible
pokedex: It nests in small, horizontal holes in cave walls. It pounces to catch prey that stray too close.

name: Gabite
pokedex: There is a long-held belief that medicine made from its scales will heal even incurable illnesses.

name: Garchomp
pokedex: When it folds up its body and extends its wings, it looks like a jet plane. It flies at sonic speed.

name: Munchlax
pokedex: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.

name: Riolu
pokedex: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

name: Lucario
pokedex: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.

name: Hippopotas
pokedex: It lives in arid places. Instead of perspiration, it expels grainy sand from its body.

name: Hippowdon
pokedex: It blasts internally stored sand from ports on its body to create a towering twister for attack.

name: Skorupi
pokedex: It grips prey with its tail claws and injects poison. It tenaciously hangs on until the poison takes.

name: Drapion
pokedex: It has the power in its clawed arms to make scrap of a car. The tips of its claws release poison.

name: Croagunk
pokedex: Its cheeks hold poison sacs. It tries to catch foes off guard to jab them with toxic fingers.

name: Toxicroak
pokedex: Its knuckle claws secrete a toxin so vile that even a scratch could prove fatal.

name: Carnivine
pokedex: It attracts prey with its sweet-smelling saliva, then chomps down. It takes a whole day to eat prey.

name: Finneon
pokedex: After long exposure to sunlight, the patterns on its tail fins shine vividly when darkness arrives.

name: Lumineon
pokedex: It lives on the deep-sea floor. It attracts prey by flashing the patterns on its four tail fins.

name: Mantyke
pokedex: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

name: Snover
pokedex: It lives on snowy mountains. Having had little contact with humans, it is boldly inquisitive.

name: Abomasnow
pokedex: It whips up blizzards in mountains that are always buried in snow. It is the abominable snowman.

name: Weavile
pokedex: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.

name: Magnezone
pokedex: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

name: Lickilicky
pokedex: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

name: Rhyperior
pokedex: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. Geodude are shot at rare times.

name: Tangrowth
pokedex: Las enredaderas han crecido, protegiendo aún mejor su cuerpo y aportándole nuevas estructuras como grandes brazos extensibles.

name: Electivire
pokedex: It pushes the tips of its two tails against the foe, then lets loose with over 20,000 volts of power.

name: Magmortar
pokedex: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

name: Togekiss
pokedex: It will never appear where there is strife. Its sightings have become rare recently.

name: Yanmega
pokedex: By churning its wings, it creates shock waves that inflict critical internal injuries to foes.

name: Leafeon
pokedex: Es de las mutaciones más drásticas de Eevee ya que desarrolla estructuras que le permiten realizar la fotosíntesis o fecundar con su polen a distancia.

name: Glaceon
pokedex: Está muy bien adaptado al frio ya que su sangre tiene una sustancia anticongelante que evita que su cuerpo se congele incluso a -200ºC.

name: Gliscor
pokedex: It observes prey while hanging inverted from branches. When the chance presents itself, it swoops!

name: Mamoswine
pokedex: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.

name: Porygon-Z
pokedex: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

name: Gallade
pokedex: A master of courtesy and swordsmanship, it fights using extending swords on its elbows.

name: Probopass
pokedex: It exudes strong magnetism from all over. It controls three small units called Mini-Noses.

name: Dusknoir
pokedex: The antenna on its head captures radio waves from the world of spirits that command it to take people there.

name: Froslass
pokedex: Se dice que es el alma de una bella mujer fallecida en la nieve. Aparece en tormentas nevadas y congela a viajeros atrapados en ellas.

name: Rotom
pokedex: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

name: Uxie
pokedex: Known as “The Being of Knowledge.” It is said that it can wipe out the memory of those who see its eyes.

name: Mesprit
pokedex: Known as “The Being of Emotion.” It taught humans the nobility of sorrow, pain, and joy.

name: Azelf
pokedex: Known as “The Being of Willpower.” It sleeps at the bottom of a lake to keep the world in balance.

name: Dialga
pokedex: It has the power to control time. It appears in Sinnoh-region myths as an ancient deity.

name: Palkia
pokedex: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

name: Heatran
pokedex: It dwells in volcanic caves. It digs in with its cross-shaped feet to crawl on ceilings and walls.

name: Regigigas
pokedex: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

name: Giratina
pokedex: A Pokémon that is said to live in a world on the reverse side of ours. It appears in an ancient cemetery.

name: Cresselia
pokedex: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

name: Phione
pokedex: A Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

name: Manaphy
pokedex: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

name: Darkrai
pokedex: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

name: Shaymin
pokedex: It lives in flower patches and avoids detection by curling up to look like a flowering plant.

name: Arceus
pokedex: It is described in mythology as the Pokémon that shaped the universe with its 1,000 arms.

name: Victini
pokedex: This Pokémon brings victory. It is said that Trainers with Victini always win, regardless of the type of encounter.

name: Snivy
pokedex: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

name: Servine
