pokedex: They avoid attacks by sinking into the shadows of thick foliage. They retaliate with masterful whipping techniques.

name: Serperior
pokedex: They raise their heads to intimidate opponents, but only give it their all when fighting a powerful opponent.

name: Tepig
pokedex: It blows fire through its nose. When it catches a cold, the fire becomes pitch-black smoke instead.

name: Pignite
pokedex: Whatever it eats becomes fuel for the flame in its stomach. When it is angered, the intensity of the flame increases.

name: Emboar
pokedex: It can throw a fire punch by setting its fists on fire with its fiery chin. It cares deeply about its friends.

name: Oshawott
pokedex: The scalchop on its stomach is made from the same elements as claws. It detaches the scalchop for use as a blade.

name: Dewott
pokedex: Scalchop techniques differ from one Dewott to another. It never neglects maintaining its scalchops.

name: Samurott
pokedex: Part of the armor on its anterior legs becomes a giant sword. Its cry alone is enough to intimidate most enemies.

name: Patrat
pokedex: Extremely cautious, they take shifts to maintain a constant watch of their nest. They feel insecure without a lookout.

name: Watchog
pokedex: They make the patterns on their bodies shine in order to threaten predators. Keen eyesight lets them see in the dark.

name: Lillipup
pokedex: Es activo, sobreprotector, tranquilo y le encanta que su entrenador le preste atención. Necesitan ejercicio físico diario para estar sanos.

name: Herdier
pokedex: No es fácil de adiestrar pero es un buen vigilante, ladra al mínimo movimiento sospechoso o cuando alguien se acerca y parece peligroso.

name: Stoutland
pokedex: Es tranquilo, dócil y muy leal. Cuidan de sus seres queridos, su entrenador no dudará en dejarlo al cuidado de sus hijos si debe ausentarse.

name: Purrloin
pokedex: Its cute act is a ruse. When victims let down their guard, they find their items taken. It attacks with sharp claws.

name: Liepard
pokedex: Stealthily, it sneaks up on its target, striking from behind before its victim has a chance to react.

name: Pansage
pokedex: It shares the leaf on its head with weary-looking Pokémon. These leaves are known to relieve stress.

name: Simisage
pokedex: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

name: Pansear
pokedex: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600º F.

name: Simisear
pokedex: A flame burns inside its body. It scatters embers from its head and tail to sear its opponents.

name: Panpour
pokedex: It does not thrive in dry environments. It keeps itself damp by shooting water stored in its head tuft from its tail.

name: Simipour
pokedex: The high-pressure water expelled from its tail is so powerful, it can destroy a concrete wall.

name: Munna
pokedex: It eats the dreams of people and Pokémon. When it eats a pleasant dreams, it expels pink-colored mist.

name: Musharna
pokedex: With the mist from its forehead, it can create shapes of things from dreams it has eaten.

name: Pidove
pokedex: These Pokémon live in cities. They are accustomed to people. Flocks often gather in parks and plazas.

name: Tranquill
pokedex: Many people believe that, deep in the forest where Tranquill live, there is a peaceful place where there is no war.

name: Unfezant
pokedex: Males have plumage on their heads. They will never let themselves feel close to anyone other than their Trainers.

name: Blitzle
pokedex: When thunderclouds cover the sky, it will appear. It can catch lightning with its mane and store the electricity.

name: Zebstrika
pokedex: This ill-tempered Pokémon is dangerous because when it's angry, it shoots lightning from its mane in all directions.

name: Roggenrola
pokedex: They were discovered a hundred years ago in an earthquake fissure. Inside each one is an energy core.

name: Boldore
pokedex: Because its energy was too great to be contained, the energy leaked and formed orange crystals.

name: Gigalith
pokedex: The solar energy absorbed by its body's orange crystals is magnified internally and fired from its mouth.

name: Woobat
pokedex: Suction from its nostrils enables it to stick to cave walls during sleep. It leaves a heart-shaped mark behind.

name: Swoobat
pokedex: Anyone who comes into contact with the ultrasonic waves emitted by a courting male experiences a positive mood shift.

name: Drilbur
pokedex: It makes its way swiftly through the soil by putting both claws together and rotating at high speed.

name: Excadrill
pokedex: More than 300 feet below the surface, they build mazelike nests. Their activity can be destructive to subway tunnels.

name: Audino
pokedex: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has a radar-like ability to understand its surrounding through slight sounds.

name: Timburr
pokedex: These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.

name: Gurdurr
pokedex: They strengthen their bodies by carrying steel beams. They show off their big muscles to their friends.

name: Conkeldurr
pokedex: They use concrete pillars as walking canes. They know moves that enable them to swing the pillars freely in battle.

name: Tympole
pokedex: By vibrating its cheeks, it emits sound waves imperceptible to humans. It uses the rhythm of these sounds to talk.

name: Palpitoad
pokedex: It lives in the water and on land. It uses its long, sticky tongue to capture prey.

name: Seismitoad
pokedex: It increases the power of its punches by vibrating the bumps on its fists. It can turn a boulder to rubble with one punch.

name: Throh
pokedex: When they encounter foes bigger than themselves, they try to throw them. They always travel in packs of five.

name: Sawk
pokedex: Tying their belts gets them pumped and makes their punches more destructive. Disturbing their training angers them.

name: Sewaddle
pokedex: This Pokémon makes clothes for itself. It chews up leaves and sews them with sticky thread extruded from its mouth.

name: Swadloon
pokedex: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

name: Leavanny
pokedex: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

name: Venipede
pokedex: It discovers what is going on around it by using the feelers on its head and tail. It is brutally aggresive.

name: Whirlipede
pokedex: It is usually motionless, but when attacked, it rotates at high speed and then crashes into its opponent.

name: Scolipede
pokedex: Highly aggressive, it uses the claws near its neck to dig into its opponents and poison them.

name: Cottonee
pokedex: They go wherever the wind takes them. On rainy days, their bodies are heavier, so they take shelter beneath big trees.

name: Whimsicott
pokedex: Riding whirlwinds, they appear. These Pokémon sneak through gaps into houses and cause all sorts of mischief.

name: Petilil
pokedex: Since they prefer moist, nutrient-rich soil, the areas where Petilil live are known to be good for growing plants.

name: Lilligant
pokedex: The fragrance of the garland on its head has a relaxing effect. It withers if a Trainer does not take good care of it.

name: Basculin
pokedex: Red and blue Basculin usually do not get along, but sometimes members of one school mingle with the other's schooL.

name: Sandile
pokedex: It moves along below the sand's surface, except for its nose and eyes. A dark membrane shields its eyes from the sun.

name: Krokorok
pokedex: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see its surroundings, even in darkness.

name: Krookodile
pokedex: It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if it were using binoculars.

name: Darumaka
pokedex: Darumaka's droppings are hot, so people used to put them in their clothes to keep themselves warm.

name: Darmanitan
pokedex: When weakened in battle, it transforms into a stone statue. Then it sharpens its mind and fights on mentally.

name: Maractus
pokedex: Arid regions are their habitat. They move rhythmically, making a sound similar to maracas.

name: Dwebble
pokedex: It makes a hole in a suitable rock. If that rock breaks, the Pokémon remains agitated until it locates a replacement.

name: Crustle
pokedex: It possesses legs of enormous strength, enabling it to carry heavy slabs for many days, even when crossing arid land.

name: Scraggy
pokedex: It immediately headbutts anyone that makes eye contact with it. Its skull is massively thick.

name: Scrafty
pokedex: It can smash concrete blocks with its kicking attacks. The one with the biggest crest is the group leader.

name: Sigilyph
pokedex: The guardians of an ancient city, they use their psychic power to attack enemies that invade their territory.

name: Yamask
pokedex: These Pokémon arose from the spirits of people interred in graves in past ages. Each retains memories of its former life.

name: Cofagrigus
pokedex: They pretend to be elaborate coffins to teach lessons to grave robbers. Their bodies are covered in pure gold.

name: Tirtouga
pokedex: About 100 million years ago, these Pokémon swam in oceans. It is thought they also went on land to attack prey.

name: Carracosta
pokedex: Incredible jaw strength enables them to chew up steel beams and rocks along with their prey.

name: Archen
pokedex: Revived from a fossil, this Pokémon is thought to be the ancestor of all bird Pokémon.

name: Archeops
pokedex: It runs better than it flies. It catches prey by running at speeds comparable to those of an automobile.

name: Trubbish
pokedex: The combination of garbage bags and industrial waste caused the chemical reaction that crated this Pokémon.

name: Garbodor
pokedex: They absorb garbage and make it part of their bodies. They shoot a poisonous liquid from their right-hand fingertips.

name: Zorua
pokedex: To protect themselves from danger, they hide their true identities by transforming into people and Pokémon.

name: Zoroark
pokedex: Each has the ability to fool a large group of people simultaneously. They protect their lair with illusory scenery.

name: Minccino
pokedex: These Pokémon prefer a tidy habitat. They are always sweeping and dusting, using their tails as brooms.

name: Cinccino
pokedex: Their white fur feels amazing to touch. Their fur repels dust and prevents static electricity from building up.

name: Gothita
pokedex: They intently observe both Trainers and Pokémon. Apparently, they are looking at something that only Gothita can see.

name: Gothorita
pokedex: Starlight is the source of their power. At night, they mark star positions by using psychic power to float stones.

name: Gothitelle
pokedex: They can predict the future from the placement and movement of the stars. They can see Trainers' life spans.

name: Solosis
pokedex: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.

name: Duosion
pokedex: When their brains, now divided in two, are thinking the same thoughts, these Pokémon exhibit their maximum power.

name: Reuniclus
pokedex: These remarkably intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling arms that can grip with rock-crushing power.

name: Ducklett
pokedex: When attacked, it uses its feathers to splash water, escaping under cover of the spray.

name: Swanna
pokedex: It administers sharp, powerful pecks with its bill. It whips its long neck to deliver forceful repeated strikes.

name: Vanillite
pokedex: This Pokémon formed from icicles bathed in energy from the morning sun. It sleeps buried in snow.

name: Vanillish
pokedex: It conceals itself from enemy eyes by creating many small ice particles and hiding among them.

name: Vanilluxe
pokedex: If both heads get angry simultaneously, this Pokémon expels a blizzard, burying everything in snow.

name: Deerling
pokedex: The turning of the seasons changes the color and scent of this Pokémon's fur. People use it to mark the seasons.

name: Sawsbuck
pokedex: The plants growing on its horns change according to the season. The leaders of the herd possess magnificent horns.

name: Emolga
pokedex: They live on treetops and glide using the inside of a cape-like membrane while discharging electricity.

name: Karrablast
pokedex: When they feel threatened, they spit an acidic liquid to drive attackers away. This Pokémon targets Shelmet.

name: Escavalier
pokedex: These Pokémon evolve by wearing the shell covering of a Shelmet. The steel armor protects their whole body.

name: Foongus
pokedex: For some reason, this Pokémon resembles a Poké Ball. They release poison spores to repel those who try to catch them.

name: Amoonguss
pokedex: They show off their Poké Ball caps to lure prey, but very few Pokémon are fooled by this.

name: Frillish
pokedex: They paralyze prey with poison, then drag them down to their lairs, five miles below the surface.

name: Jellicent
pokedex: They propel themselves by expelling absorbed seawater from their bodies. Their favorite food is life energy.

name: Alomomola
pokedex: Floating in the open sea is how they live. When they find a wounded Pokémon, they embrace it and bring it to shore.

name: Joltik
pokedex: They attach themselves to large-bodied Pokémon and absorb static electricity, which they store in an electric pouch.

name: Galvantula
pokedex: They employ an electrically charged web to trap their prey. While it is immobilized by shock, they leisurely consume it.

name: Ferroseed
pokedex: They stick their spikes into cave walls and absorb the minerals they find in the rock.

name: Ferrothorn
pokedex: They attach themselves to cave ceilings, firing steel spikes at targets passing beneath them.

name: Klink
pokedex: Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.

name: Klang
pokedex: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

name: Klinklang
pokedex: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.

name: Tynamo
pokedex: These Pokémon move in schools. They have an electricity-generating organ, so they discharge electricity if in danger.

name: Eelektrik
pokedex: These Pokémon have a big appetite. When they spot their prey, they attack it and paralyze it with electricity.

name: Eelektross
pokedex: With their sucker mouths, they suck in prey. Then they use their fangs to shock the prey with electricity.

name: Elgyem
pokedex: This Pokémon had never been seen until it appeared from far in the desert 50 years ago.

name: Beheeyem
pokedex: It uses psychic power to control an opponent's brain and tamper with its memories.

name: Litwick
pokedex: While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.

name: Lampent
pokedex: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.

name: Chandelure
pokedex: Being consumed in Chandelure's flame burns up the spirit, leaving the body behind.

name: Axew
pokedex: They mark their territory by leaving gashes in trees with their tusks. If a tusk breaks, a new one grows in quickly.

name: Fraxure
pokedex: Their tusks can shatter rocks. Territory battles between Fraxure can be intensely violent.

name: Haxorus
pokedex: Their sturdy tusks will stay sharp even if used to cut steel beams. These Pokémon are covered in hard armor.

name: Cubchoo
pokedex: Its nose is always running. It sniffs the snot back up because the mucus provides the raw material for its moves.

name: Beartic
pokedex: It freezes its breath to create fangs and claws of ice to fight with. Cold northern areas are its habitat.

name: Cryogonal
pokedex: They are born in snow clouds. They use chains made of ice crystals to capture prey.

name: Shelmet
pokedex: It evolves when bathed in an electric-like energy along with Karrablast. The reason is still unknown.

name: Accelgor
pokedex: Having removed its heavy shell, it becomes very light and can fight with ninja-like movements.

name: Stunfisk
pokedex: It conceals itself in the mud of the seashore. Then it waits. When prey touch it, it delivers a jolt of energy.

name: Mienfoo
pokedex: They have mastered elegant combos. As they concentrate, their battle moves become swifter and more precise.

name: Mienshao
pokedex: They use the long fur on their arms as a whip to strike their opponents.

name: Druddigon
pokedex: It races through narrow caves, using its sharp claws to catch prey. Then skin on its face is harder than a rock.

name: Golett
pokedex: These Pokémon are thought to have been created by the science of an ancient and mysterious civilization.

name: Golurk
pokedex: It is said that Golurk were ordered to protect people and Pokémon by the ancient people who made them.

name: Pawniard
pokedex: Descendiente de una larga estirpe de Bisharp que lucharon en los tercios españoles, entrena duro para llegar a ser tan diestro como sus antecesores.

name: Bisharp
pokedex: Algunos fueron contratados como mercenarios por los tercios españoles y con el tiempo adoptaron las ropas y técnicas de combate de estos soldados.

name: Bouffalant
pokedex: They charge wildly and headbutt everything. They headbutts have enough destructive force to derail a train.

name: Rufflet
pokedex: They will challenge anything, even strong opponents, without fear. Their frequent fights help them become stronger.

name: Braviary
pokedex: The more scars they have, the more respect these brave soldiers of the sky get from their peers.

name: Vullaby
pokedex: They tend to guard their posteriors with suitable bones they have found. They pursue weak Pokémon.

name: Mandibuzz
pokedex: Watching from the sky, they swoop to strike weakened Pokémon on the ground. They decorate themselves with bones.

name: Heatmor
pokedex: Using their very hot, flame-covered tongues, they burn through Durant's steel bodies and consume their insides.

name: Durant
pokedex: Durant dig nests in mountains. They build their complicated, interconnected tunnels in mazes.

name: Deino
pokedex: They cannot see, so they tackle and bite to learn about their surroundings. Their bodies are covered in wounds.

name: Zweilous
pokedex: Since their two heads do not get along and compete with each other for food, they always eat too much.

name: Hydreigon
pokedex: The heads on their arms do not have brains. They use all three heads to consume and destroy everything.

name: Larvesta
pokedex: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.

name: Volcarona
pokedex: A sea of fire engulfs the surroundings of their battles, since they use their six wings to scatter their ember scales.

name: Cobalion
pokedex: It has a body and heart of steel. Its glare is sufficient to make even an unruly Pokémon obey it.

name: Terrakion
pokedex: Its charge is strong enough to break through a giant castle wall in one blow. This Pokémon is spoken of in legends.

name: Virizion
pokedex: Its head sprouts horns as sharp as blades. Using whirlwind-like movements, it confounds and swiftly cuts opponents.

name: Tornadus
pokedex: Tornadus expels massive energy from its tail, causing severe storms. Its power is great enough to blow houses away.

name: Thundurus
pokedex: The spikes on its tail discharge immense bolts of lightning. It flies around the Unova region firing off lightning bolts.

name: Reshiram
pokedex: When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

name: Zekrom
pokedex: This Pokémon appears in legends. In its tail, it has a giant generator that creates electricity.

name: Landorus
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Kyurem
pokedex: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

name: Keldeo
pokedex: It crosses the world, running over the surfaces of oceans and rivers. It appears at scenic waterfronts.

name: Meloetta
pokedex: Many famous songs have been inspired by the melodies that Meloetta plays.

name: Genesect
pokedex: This ancient bug Pokémon was altered by Team Plasma. They upgraded the cannon on its back.

name: Chespin
pokedex: The quills on its head are usually soft. When it flexes them, the points become so hard and sharp that they can pierce rock.

name: Quilladin
pokedex: They strengthen their lower bodies by running into one another. They are very kind and won't start fights.

name: Chesnaught
pokedex: En el pasado, este Pokémon era un letal cazador de dragones y de otras criaturas voladoras gracias a sus púas.

name: Fennekin
pokedex: As it walks, it munches on a twig in place of a snack. It intimidates opponents by puffing hot air out of its ears.

name: Braixen
pokedex: When the twig is plucked from its tail, friction sets the twig alight. The flame is used to send signals to its allies.

name: Delphox
pokedex: En el pasado, era considerado el mejor de los espadachines. Luchaba bendecido por la tormenta.

name: Froakie
pokedex: It protects its skin by covering its body in delicate bubbles. Beneath its happy-go-lucky air, it keeps a watchful eye on its surroundings.

name: Frogadier
pokedex: It can throw bubble-covered pebbles with precise control, hitting empty cans up to a hundred feet away.

name: Greninja
pokedex: En el pasado, era un maestro del engaño y las ilusiones. Muchos reinos fueron víctima de sus trucos.

name: Bunnelby
pokedex: It has ears like shovels. Digging holes strengthens its ears so much that they can sever thick roots effortlessly.

name: Diggersby
pokedex: As powerful as an excavator, its ears can reduce dense bedrock to rubble. When it’s finished digging, it lounges lazily.

name: Fletchling
pokedex: These friendly Pokemon send signals to one another with beautiful chirps and tail-feather movements.

name: Fletchinder
pokedex: The hotter the flame sac on its belly, the faster it can fly, but it takes some time to get the fire going.

name: Talonflame
pokedex: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

name: Scatterbug
pokedex: The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.

name: Spewpa
pokedex: It lives hidden within thicket shadows. When predators attack, it quickly bristles the fur covering its body in an effort to threaten them.

name: Vivillon
pokedex: Vivillon with many different patterns are found all over the world. These patterns are affected by the climate of their habitat.

name: Litleo
pokedex: They set off on their own from their pride and live by themselves to become stronger. These hot-blooded Pokémon are quick to fight.

name: Pyroar
pokedex: With fiery breath of more than 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, they viciously threaten any challenger. The females protect the pride’s cubs.

name: Flabebe
pokedex: When it finds a flower it likes, it dwells on that flower its whole life long. It floats in the wind’s embrace with an untroubled heart.

name: Floette
pokedex: It flutters around fields of flowers and cares for flowers that are starting to wilt. It draws out the power of flowers to battle.

name: Florges
pokedex: It claims exquisite flower gardens as its territory, and it obtains power from basking in the energy emitted by flowering plants.

name: Skiddo
pokedex: Thought to be one of the first Pokemon to live in harmony with humans, it has a placid disposition.

name: Gogoat
pokedex: They inhabit mountainous regions. The leader of the herd is decided by a battle of clashing horns.

name: Pancham
pokedex: It does its best to be taken seriously by its enemies, but its glare is not sufficiently intimidating. Chewing on a leaf is its trademark.

name: Pangoro
pokedex: It charges ahead and bashes its opponents like a berserker, uncaring about any hits it might take. Its arms are mighty enough to snap a telephone pole.

name: Furfrou
pokedex: Historically, in the Kalos region, these Pokemon were the designated guardians of the king.

name: Espurr
pokedex: It has enough psychic energy to blast everything within 300 feet of itself, but it has no control over its power.

name: Meowstic
pokedex: When in danger, it raises its ears and releases enough psychic power to grind a 10-ton truck to dust.

name: Honedge
pokedex: Apparently this Pokemon is born when a departed spirit inhabits a sword. It attaches itself to people and drinks their life force.

name: Doublade
pokedex: The complex attack patterns of its two swords are unstoppable, even for an opponent greatly accomplished at swordplay.

name: Aegislash
pokedex: Apparently, it can detect the innate qualities of leadership. According to legend, whoever it recognizes is destined to become king.

name: Spritzee
pokedex: In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked.

name: Aromatisse
pokedex: Its scent is so overpowering that, unless a Trainer happens to really enjoy the smell, he or she will have a hard time walking alongside it.

name: Swirlix
pokedex: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and as sticky as cotton candy.

name: Slurpuff
pokedex: Its sense of smell is 100 million times better than a human’s, so even the faintest scent tells it about everything in the area. It’s like it can see with its nose!

name: Inkay
pokedex: It flashes the light-emitting spots on its body, which drains its opponent’s will to fight. It takes the opportunity to scuttle away and hide.

name: Malamar
pokedex: It lures its prey close with hypnotic motions, then wraps its tentacles around it before finishing it off with digestive fluids.

name: Binacle
pokedex: Two Binacle live together on one rock. When they fight, one of them will move to a different rock.

name: Barbaracle
pokedex: Barbaracle's legs and hands have minds of their own, and they will move independently. But they usually follow the head's orders.

name: Skrelp
pokedex: Camouflaged as rotten kelp, they spray liquid poison on prey that approaches unawares and then finish it off.

name: Dragalge
pokedex: Tales are told of ships that wander into seas where Dragalge live, never to return.

name: Clauncher
pokedex: They knock down flying prey by firing compressed water from their massive claws like shooting a pistol.

name: Clawitzer
pokedex: Their enormous claws launch cannonballs of water powerful enough to pierce tanker hulls.

name: Helioptile
pokedex: They make their home in desserts. They can generate their energy from basking in the sun, so eating food is not a requirement.

name: Heliolisk
pokedex: They flare their frills and generate energy. A single Heliolisk can generate sufficiant electricity to power a skyscraper.

name: Tyrunt
pokedex: Its immense jaws have enough destructive force that it can chew up an automobile It lived 100 million years ago.

name: Tyrantrum
pokedex: Nothing could stop this Pokemon 100 years ago, so it behaved like a king.

name: Amaura
pokedex: This ancient Pokemon was restored from part of its body that had been frozen in ice for over 100 million years.

name: Aurorus
pokedex: The diamond-shaped crystals on its body expel air as cold as -240 degrees Fahrenheit, surrounding its enemies and encasing them in ice.

name: Sylveon
pokedex: Es muy amistoso, cariñoso y alegre. Se preocupa por el bienestar de su entrenador sin poder evitarlo ya que presenta genes que lo incitan a ello.

name: Hawlucha
pokedex: Although its body is small, its proficient fighting skills enable it to keep up with big bruisers like Machamp and Hariyama.

name: Dedenne
pokedex: It uses its tail to absorb electricity from power plants or from outlets in houses, and then it fires the electricity from its whiskers.

name: Carbink
pokedex: It has slept underground for hundreds of millions of years since its birth. It's occasionally found during the excavation of caves.

name: Goomy
pokedex: The weakest Dragon-type Pokémon, it lives in damp, shady places, so its body doesn't dry out.

name: Sliggoo
pokedex: It drives away opponents by excreting a sticky liquid that can dissolve anything. Its eyes devolved, so it can't see anything.

name: Goodra
pokedex: This very friendly Dragon-type Pokemon will hug its beloved Trainer, leaving that Trainer covered in sticky slime.

name: Klefki
pokedex: It never lets go of a key that it likes, so people give it the keys to vaults and safes as a way to prevent crime.

name: Phantump
pokedex: According to old tales, these Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died while lost in the forest.

name: Trevenant
pokedex: It can control trees at will. It will trap people who harm the forest, so they can never leave.

name: Pumpkaboo
pokedex: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.

name: Gourgeist
pokedex: It enwraps its prey in its hairlike arms. It sings joyfully as it observes the suffering of its prey.

name: Bergmite
pokedex: It blocks opponents' attacks with the ice that shields its body. It uses cold air to repair any cracks with new ice.

name: Avalugg
pokedex: Its ice-covered body is as hard as steel. Its cumbersome frame crushes anything that stands in its way.

name: Noibat
pokedex: They live in pitch black caves. Their enormous ears can emit ultrasonic waves of 200,000 hertz.

name: Noivern
pokedex: The ultrasonic waves it emits from its ears can reduce a large boulder to pebbles. It swoops out of the dark to attack.

name: Xerneas
pokedex: Legends say it can share eternal life. It slept for a thousand years in the form of a tree before its revival.

name: Yveltal
pokedex: When its life comes to an end, it absorbs the life energy of every living thing and turns into a cocoon once more.

name: Zygarde
pokedex: It's hypothesized that it's monitoring those who destroy the ecosystem from deep in the cave where it lives.

name: Diancie
pokedex: A sudden transformation of Carbink, its pink, glimmering body is said to be the loveliest sight in the whole world.

name: Hoopa
pokedex: It gathers things it likes and pushes them through its loop to teleport them to a secret place.

name: Volcanion
pokedex: It expels its internal steam from the arms on its back. It has enough power to blow away a mountain.

name: Rowlet
pokedex: This wary Pokémon uses photosynthesis to store up energy during the day, while becoming active at night.

name: Dartrix
pokedex: It spends its free time preening its wings. Its preoccupation with any dirt on its plumage can leave it unable to battle.

name: Decidueye
pokedex: It fires arrow quills from its wings with such precision, they can pierce a pebble from over hundred yards.

name: Litten
pokedex: While grooming itself, it build up fur inside its stomach. It sets the fur alight and spews fiery attacks, which change based on how it coughs.

name: Torracat
pokedex: At its throat, it bears a bell of fire. The bell rings brightly whenever this Pokémon spits fire.

name: Incineroar
pokedex: This Pokémon has a violent, selfish disposition. When in a bad mood, it may ignore its Trainer's orders with complete nonchalance.

name: Popplio
pokedex: This Pokémon snorts body fluid from its nose, blowing balloons to smash into its foes. It's famous for being a hard worker.

name: Brionne
pokedex: A skillful dancer, it creates a sequence of water balloons as it dances, and briskly bombards its enemies.

name: Primarina
pokedex: It controls its water balloons by singing. The melody is learned from others of its kind and is passed down a generation.

name: Pikipek
pokedex: It can peck at a rate of 16 times a second to drill holes in trees. It uses the holes for food storage and nesting.

name: Trumbeak
pokedex: It eats berries and stores their seeds in its beak. When it encounters enemies or Prey, it fires off all the seeds in a burst.

name: Toucannon
pokedex: When it battles its beak heats up. The heat can easily exceed 100 degrees Celcius, causing severe burns when it hits.

name: Yungoos
pokedex: It wanders around in a never-ending search for food. At dusk, it collapses from exhaustioni and falls asleep on the spot.

name: Gumshoos
pokedex: When it finds a trace of its prey, it patiently stakes out the location, but it's always snoozing by nightfall.

name: Grubbin
pokedex: Vive en campos o bosques junto a centrales eléctricas. Usa sus potentes mandíbulas para penetrar la corteza de árboles y absorber la savia.

name: Charjabug
pokedex: Se mueve muy poco y almacena energía hasta que evoluciona, la cual puede transferirla a objetos u otros Pokémon como si fuera una batería.

name: Vikavolt
pokedex: Los machos combaten con sus mandíbulas para disputarse a las hembras. Éstas tras el apareamiento ponen sus huevos en huecos en la corteza de árboles.

name: Crabrawler
pokedex: It punches so much, its pincers often come off from overuse, but they grow back quickly.

name: Crabominable
pokedex: It aimed for the top but got lost and ended up on a snowy mountain. Being forced to endure the cold, this Pokémon evolved.

name: Oricorio
pokedex: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in flames.

name: Cutiefly
pokedex: Because Cutiefly are able to sense auras, they can identify which flowers are about to bloom.

name: Ribombee
pokedex: It rolls up pollen into puffs. It makes many different varieties, some used as food and others for battle.

name: Rockruff
pokedex: It's a good Pokémon for beginners because of its friendlinless, but its disposition grows rougher as it grows up.

name: Lycanroc
pokedex: Its quick moves confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the rocks in its mane as weapons.

name: Wishiwashi
pokedex: When in trouble, their eyes shine. The shining light attracts its comrades who will help them out.

name: Mareanie
pokedex: The coral that grows on Corsola's head is as good as a five-star banquet to this Pokémon.

name: Toxapex
pokedex: It crawls along the ocean floor on its 12 legs. It leaves a trail of Corsola bits scattered in its wake.

name: Mudbray
pokedex: The mud stuck to Mudbray's hooves enhances its grip and its powerful running gait.

name: Mudsdale
pokedex: It spits a mud that provides resistance to both wind and rain, so the walls of old houses were often coated with it.

name: Dewpider
pokedex: It crawls onto the land in search of food. Its water bubble allows it to breathe and protects its soft head.

name: Araquanid
pokedex: It delivers headbutts with the water bubbleon its head. Small Pokémon get sucked in the bubble and drown.

name: Fomantis
pokedex: During the day, it sleeps and soaks up light. When night falls, it walks around looking for a safer place to sleep.

name: Lurantis
pokedex: It fires beams from its petals. These beams are powerful enough to cleave through thick metal plates.

name: Morelull
pokedex: It scatters spores that flicker and glow. Anyone seeing these lights falls into a deep slumber.

name: Shiinotic
pokedex: Forests where Shiinotic live are treacherous to enter at night. People are confused by their lights and get lost.

name: Salandit
pokedex: It burns its bodily fluids to create poisonous gas. It attack its enemies once they inhale it.

name: Salazzle
pokedex: Filled with pheromones, its poisonous gas can be diluted to use in the production of perfumes.

name: Stufful
pokedex: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

name: Bewear
pokedex: This immensely dangerous Pokémon possesses overwhelming strength. Its habitat is generally offlimits.

name: Bounsweet
pokedex: A delectable aroma pours from its body. They are often swallowed by birds lured by that wafting deliciousness.

name: Steenee
pokedex: The sepals on its head are quite hard, so even if pecked by bird Pokémon, this Pokémon is totally fine.

name: Tsareena
pokedex: Its long, striking legs aren't just for show but to be used to kick with skill.

name: Comfey
pokedex: It attaches flowers to its highly nutritious vine. This revitalizes the flower and give off an aromatic scent.

name: Oranguru
pokedex: Known for its intelligence, this Pokémon looks down on inexperienced Trainers, so it's best for veteran Trainers.

name: Passimian
pokedex: They form groups of about 20 individuals. Their mutual bond is remarkable - They will never let down a comrade.

name: Wimpod
pokedex: As it desperately dashes off, the flailing of its many legs leave a sparkling clean path in its wake.

name: Golisopod
pokedex: With a flashing slash of its giant sharp claws, it cleaves seawater - or even air - right into two.

name: Sandygast
pokedex: Born from a sand mound playfully built by a child, this Pokémon embodies the grudges of the departed.

name: Palossand
pokedex: Buried beneath the castle are masses of bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

name: Pyukumuku
pokedex: It can eject its internal organs, which it uses to engulf its prey or battle enemies.

name: Código Cero
pokedex: The heavy control mask it wears suppresses its capabilities. This Pokémon has some hidden special power.

name: Silvally
pokedex: Its trust in its partner is what awakens it. This Pokémon is capable of changing its type.

name: Minior
pokedex: Strong impacts can knock it out of its shell. This Pokémon was born from mutated nanoparticles.

name: Komala
pokedex: The log it holds was give to it by its parents. It is also known to cling to the arm of a friendly Trainer.

name: Turtonator
pokedex: The shell on its back is chemically unstable and explodes violently. The hole in its stomach is its weak point.

name: Togedemaru
pokedex: The long hairs on its back act as lightning rods. The bolts of lightning it attracts are stored as energy.

name: Mimikyu
pokedex: Its actual appearance is unknown. When a scholar saw what was under its rag, it was overwhelmed by terror and died.

name: Bruxish
pokedex: It stuns its prey with psychokinesis and then grinds them to mush with its strong teeth.

name: Drampa
pokedex: It has a compassionate personality, but when angered, it completely destroys its surroundings with its breath.

name: Dhelmise
pokedex: Swinging its massive anchor, it can KO Wailord in a single blow. What appears to be green seaweed is actually its body.

name: Jangmo-o
pokedex: It expresses its feelings by smacking its scales. Metallic sounds echo through the tall mountains where it lives.

name: Hakamo-o
pokedex: It leaps at its prey with a courageous shout. Its scaly punches can tear its opponents to shreds.

name: Kommo-o
pokedex: When it spots enemies, it threatens them by jingling its scales. Weak opponents will crack and flee in panic.

name: Tapu Koko
pokedex: This guardian deity of Melemele is brimming with curiosity. It summons thunderclouds and stores their lightning.

name: Tapu Lele
pokedex: This guardian deity of Akala is guilelessly cruel. The fragrant aroma of flowers is the source of its energy.

name: Tapu Bulu
pokedex: This guardian deity of Ula'ula is lazy. It commands plants to immobilize its foes and then hits them with its horns.

name: Tapu Fini
pokedex: This guardian deity of Poni controls water. They say it can create pure water that will wash away any uncleanness.

name: Cosmog
pokedex: Its body is gaseous and frail. It slowsly grows as it collects dust from the atmosphere.

name: Cosmoem
pokedex: Motionless as if dead, its body is faintly warm to the touch. In the distant past, it was called the cocoon of stars.

name: Solgaleo
pokedex: At activation of its third eye, it departs for another world where it is said to live.

name: Lunala
pokedex: When its third eye activates, away it flies to another world where it is said to live.

name: Nihilego
pokedex: Se desconoce si este Ultraente posee consciencia propia, pero en ocasiones se comporta como una chica joven.

name: Buzzwole
pokedex: Un Ultraente procedente de otro mundo. Se desconoce si exhibe su robusto cuerpo a modo de amenaza o para que lo admiren.

name: Pheromosa
pokedex: Este Ultraente se muestra reacio al contacto, probablemente porque percibe inmundicia en todo cuanto le rodea.

name: Xurkitree
pokedex: Uno de los llamados Ultraentes. Algunos ejemplares plantan sus extremidades en el suelo como si fueran árboles y permanecen inmóviles.

name: Celesteela
pokedex: Varios testigos afirman haber visto como este Ultraente carbonizaba un bosque entero con el gas expelido por sus extremidades.

name: Kartana
pokedex: El cuerpo de este Ultraente es fino como el papel y tan cortante como una espada recién afilada.

name: Guzzlord
pokedex: Se dice que este Ultraente ha sido avistado devorando montañas enteras y tragándose prominentes edificios.

name: Necrozma
pokedex: Light is the source of its energy. If it isn't devouring light, impurities build up in it and on it, and Necrozma darkens and stops moving.

name: Magearna
pokedex: This artificial Pokémon, more than 500 years old, can understand human speech but cannot speak itself.

name: Marshadow
pokedex: Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before human, so its very existence was the stuff of myth.

name: Poipole
pokedex: En su mundo, este Ultraente se considera tan entrañable como para ser elegido compañero de viaje.

name: Naganadel
pokedex: Una de las temibles criaturas conocidas como Ultraentes. En su cuerpo almacena cientos de litros de veneno.

name: Stakataka
pokedex: Extraña criatura que podría ser un Ultraente. Parece un muro rocoso hasta que se mueve de repente y ataca.

name: Blacephalon
pokedex: Se desliza hacia la gente. Entonces, sin previo aviso, desencadena la explosión de su propia cabeza. Aparentemente es un tipo de Ultraente.

name: Zeraora
pokedex: Se acerca a sus enemigos a la velocidad del rayo, luego los descuartiza con sus afiladas garras.

name: Meltan
pokedex: La mayor parte del cuerpo de Meltan está compuesta de metal líquido, lo que le confiere una silueta maleable y fluida.

name: Melmetal
pokedex: En la antigüedad, este Pokémon se ganó la adoración de la gente gracias a su capacidad para crear metal.

name: Grookey
pokedex: Al marcar el ritmo con su baqueta especial, produce unas ondas sonoras capaces de devolver la vitalidad a la flora.

name: Thwackey
pokedex: Los Thwackey que marcan el ritmo más contundente con sus dos baquetas son los más respetados por sus congéneres.

name: Rillaboom
pokedex: El percusionista con la técnica más depurada se convierte en líder. Son de carácter tranquilo y dan mucha importancia a la armonía del grupo.

name: Scorbunny
pokedex: Se pone a correr para elevar su temperatura corporal y propagar la energía ígnea por todo el cuerpo. Desata así su verdadera fuerza.

name: Raboot
pokedex: Su suave pelaje lo protege del frío y le permite incrementar todavía más la temperatura de sus movimientos de tipo Fuego.

name: Cinderace
pokedex: Convierte piedras en balones de fuego dándoles toques y, luego, chuta con fuerza hacia el rival para chamuscarlo.

name: Sobble
pokedex: Cuando se espanta, libera unas lágrimas con un factor lacrimógeno equivalente a 100 cebollas para hacer llorar también al rival.

name: Drizzile
pokedex: Crea bolas de agua con el líquido que segrega por las palmas de las manos y las usa en combate de forma estratégica.

name: Inteleon
pokedex: Dispara chorros de agua por la punta de los dedos a 3 mach de velocidad. Con su membrana nictitante puede ver los puntos débiles del rival.

name: Skwovet
pokedex: Siempre están comiendo bayas, por lo que son más robustos de lo que aparentan. Frecuentan los huertos en busca de su preciado manjar.

name: Greedent
pokedex: Se obceca tanto en acumular bayas en la cola que no se da ni cuenta de cuando tiene demasiadas y se le acaban cayendo.

name: Rookidee
pokedex: De naturaleza valiente, planta cara a cualquier rival, por muy fuerte que sea. Los contraataques que recibe le sirven para fortalecerse.

name: Corvisquire
pokedex: Su inteligencia le permite servirse de objetos. Por ejemplo, recoge y lanza piedras con las patas, o utiliza cuerdas para atrapar a su oponente.

name: Corviknight
pokedex: No tiene rival en los cielos. El acero negro y lustroso de su cuerpo intimida a cualquier adversario.

name: Blipbug
pokedex: Siempre está recopilando información, por lo que es muy inteligente, aunque su fuerza deja bastante que desear.

name: Dottler
pokedex: Apenas se mueve, pero está vivo. Se cree que adquiere poderes psíquicos mientras permanece recluido en su caparazón sin comer ni beber.

name: Orbeetle
pokedex: Este Pokémon es conocido por su inteligencia. El gran tamaño de su cerebro es un indicio de la magnitud de sus poderes psíquicos.

name: Nickit
pokedex: Marca a su presa sin ser advertido. Sigue el olor y, cuando el Pokémon baja la guardia, aprovecha para robarle.

name: Thievul
pokedex: Un Pokémon ágil y de afiladas garras que se alimenta de huevos y comida robados. Los Boltund son su enemigo natural.

name: Gossifleur
pokedex: Si planta su única extremidad inferior en la tierra y se expone a abundante luz solar, sus pétalos cobran un color vivo.

name: Eldegoss
pokedex: Las semillas que tiene entre la pelusa son muy nutritivas. Arrastradas por el viento, devuelven la vitalidad a la flora y a otros Pokémon.

name: Wooloo
pokedex: Su lana rizada es tan acolchada que no se hace daño ni aunque se caiga por un precipicio.

name: Dubwool
pokedex: Su lana es muy flexible. Las alfombras tejidas con ella adoptan una textura similar a la de las camas elásticas.

name: Chewtle
pokedex: Muerde todo lo que se le ponga por delante. Al parecer, lo hace para aliviar el dolor que siente cuando le crecen los incisivos.

name: Drednaw
pokedex: Un Pokémon de temperamento feroz que amenaza a su presa con sus fuertes mandíbulas, capaces de destrozar una barra de hierro.

name: Yamper
pokedex: Son muy glotones, por lo que ayudan a la gente a cambio de comida. Echan chispas al correr.

name: Boltund
pokedex: La electricidad que genera y envía a sus patas le ayuda a desplazarse rápidamente. Puede correr sin descanso durante tres días y tres noches.

name: Rolycoly
pokedex: Fue descubierto hace aproximadamente 400 años en una mina. Casi la totalidad de su cuerpo presenta una composición igual a la del carbón.

name: Carkol
pokedex: Gira la patas a gran velocidad para correr a unos 30 km/h. Emite llamas a una temperatura de 1000ºC.

name: Coalossal
pokedex: Aunque es de carácter sereno, monta en cólera si ve a seres humanos dañando una mina y reduce todo a cenizas con sus llamas a 1500 ºC.

name: Applin
pokedex: Habita durante toda su vida en el interior de una manzana. Finge ser una fruta para protegerse de los Pokémon pájaro, sus enemigos naturales.

name: Flapple
pokedex: Ha evolucionado tras ingerir una manzana ácida. Las bolsas de las mejillas albergan un fluido cuya extrema acidez llega a provocar quemaduras.

name: Appletun
pokedex: Ha evolucionado tras ingerir una manzana dulce. De ahí que el olor que emana para atraer a sus presas, los Pokémon insecto, sea tan agradable.

name: Silicobra
pokedex: Almacena la arena que ingiere al perforar hoyos en la saca del cuello, cuya capacidad llega a alcanzar incluso los 8 kg.

name: Sandaconda
pokedex: Se retuerce para expulsar por los orificios nasales hasta 100 kg de arena. La ausencia de esta mina su ánimo.

name: Cramorant
pokedex: Traga Arrokuda enteros debido a su glotonería, tan notable que en ocasiones ingiere hasta otros Pokémon sin querer.

name: Arrokuda
pokedex: Se siente muy orgulloso de su afilada mandíbula. En cuanto detecta el más mínimo movimiento, va directo al objetivo para cargar contra él.

name: Barraskewda
pokedex: Su mandíbula es tan puntiaguda como una lanza y tan dura como el acero. Al parecer, su carne es sorprendentemente deliciosa.

name: Toxel
pokedex: Segrega toxinas por la piel y las almacena en una bolsa de veneno interna. Tocarlo da calambre.

name: Toxtricity
pokedex: Cuando rasga las protuberancias del pecho para generar energía eléctrica, emite un sonido similar al de una guitarra, que reverbera en el entorno.

name: Sizzlipede
pokedex: Genera calor consumiendo el gas inflamable que almacena en su cuerpo. Los círculos amarillos del abdomen están particularmente calientes.

name: Centiskorch
pokedex: Cuando genera calor, su temperatura corporal alcanza aproximadamente los 800°C. Usa el cuerpo a modo de látigo para lanzarse al ataque.

name: Clobbopus
pokedex: Emerge a tierra firme en busca de alimento. Su extrema curiosidad lo induce a golpear con los tentáculos todo lo que entra en su campo visual.

name: Grapploct
pokedex: Todo su cuerpo es una mole de puro músculo. Utiliza los tentáculos para ejecutar técnicas de estrangulamiento con una formidable potencia.

name: Sinistea
pokedex: La espiral de su cuerpo líquido es su punto débil. Si se remueve, su complexión se desestabiliza y siente vértigo.

name: Polteageist
pokedex: Se hospeda en teteras dignas de un anticuario. Las originales son escasísimas, pero existe un gran número de burdas falsificaciones.

name: Hatenna
pokedex: Percibe los sentimientos de los seres vivos con la protuberancia de la cabeza. Solo abre su corazón a quienes muestren un carácter sosegado.

name: Hattrem
pokedex: Silencia a cualquiera que muestre una emoción intensa sin importar de quién se trate y recurre para ello a métodos a cuál más violento.

name: Hatterene
pokedex: Recibe el apodo de Hechicera del Bosque. Quienes arman demasiado barullo se exponen a ser despedazados por las garras de su tentáculo.

name: Impidimp
pokedex: Con el fin de revitalizarse, inhala por la nariz la energía negativa que desprenden tanto personas como Pokémon cuando están descontentos.

name: Morgrem
pokedex: Su estrategia consiste en postrarse ante el rival y fingir una disculpa para ensartarlo con el mechón que tiene en la espalda, afilado como lanza.

name: Grimmsnarl
pokedex: Cuando enrolla sus cabellos por todo el cuerpo, aumenta su potencia muscular. Posee una fuerza capaz de someter a Machamp.

name: Obstagoon
pokedex: Evoluciona tras haber librado numerosas peleas. El grito de guerra que profiere mientras pone los brazos en cruz atemoriza a cualquier rival.

name: Perrserker
pokedex: Lo que aparenta ser un yelmo de hierro, es realmente su pelaje. Este Pokémon vive dedicado a la emoción del combate.

name: Cursola
pokedex: Su energía espiritual ha aumentado hasta hacerlo desprenderse de su base caliza. Protege el alma del núcleo con su cuerpo espectral.

name: Sirfetch'd
pokedex: Este Sirfetch'd abandonó la vía guerrera cuando empezó a aficionarse a la rica bollería de Kalos.

name: Mr. Rime
pokedex: Es un bailarín consumado de claqué. Agita su bastón de hielo mientras exhibe su destreza con gráciles pasos.

name: Runerigus
pokedex: They pretend to be elaborate coffins to teach lessons to grave robbers. Their bodies are covered in pure gold.

name: Milcery
pokedex: Su cremoso cuerpo surgió a partir de la unión de partículas odoríferas de dulces aromas presentes en el aire.

name: Alcremie
pokedex: La nata que le brota de las manos es más dulce y sustanciosa cuando está feliz.

name: Falinks
pokedex: Este Pokémon consta de cinco subalternos y un líder, cuyas órdenes obedecen sin rechistar.

name: Pincurchin
pokedex: Libera electricidad por la punta de las púas. Con sus afilados dientes raspa las algas pegadas a las rocas para ingerirlas.

name: Snom
pokedex: Teje un hilo gélido que le permite aferrarse a las ramas y simula ser un carámbano mientras duerme.

name: Frosmoth
pokedex: La temperatura de sus alas es de -180°C. Sobrevuela el campo esparciendo sus gélidas escamas, como si de nieve se tratase.

name: Stonjourner
pokedex: Una vez al año y en una fecha concreta, tienen la costumbre de aparecer de la nada para reunirse y formar un círculo.

name: Eiscue
pokedex: Se enfría constantemente la cara con hielo por su escasa resistencia al calor. Utiliza el pelo de la cabeza para pescar en el mar.

name: Indeedee
pokedex: Con sus cuernos percibe las emociones de los seres vivos que se hallen cerca. Los sentimientos positivos constituyen su fuente de energía.

name: Morpeko
pokedex: Siempre tiene apetito, sin importar lo mucho que coma. Lleva con sumo cuidado las semillas que ha tostado con su propia electricidad.

name: Cufant
pokedex: Su constitución fornida le permite transportar sin inmutarse cargas de 5 toneladas. Utiliza la trompa para excavar la tierra.

name: Copperajah
pokedex: Su piel verdosa es resistente al agua. Proviene de tierras lejanas y presta ayuda a las personas en la realización de ciertos trabajos.

name: Dracozolt
pokedex: La robustez de su tren inferior lo hacía invencible en la antigüedad, pero se extinguió tras comerse todas las plantas de las que se nutría.

name: Arctozolt
pokedex: Antiguamente vivía en el mar y usaba el hielo del cuerpo para conservar los alimentos. Su extrema lentitud, sin embargo, lo condenó a la extinción.

name: Dracovish
pokedex: Su excelente capacidad motriz y la fuerza de su mandíbula lo hacían antaño invencible, pero dar caza a todas sus presas propició su extinción.

name: Arctovish
pokedex: Aunque la piel de su rostro era capaz de resistir cualquier ataque, su dificultad para respirar acabó provocando su extinción.

name: Duraludon
pokedex: Su cuerpo, similar a un metal pulido, es tan ligero como robusto. Sin embargo, tiene el defecto de que se oxida con facilidad.

name: Dreepy
pokedex: Habitaba los mares en tiempos inmemoriales. Ha revivido en forma de Pokémon de tipo Fantasma para vagar por su antigua morada.

name: Drakloak
pokedex: Vuela a una velocidad de 200 km/h. Lucha junto a un Dreepy, al que cuida hasta el momento de su evolución.

name: Dragapult
pokedex: Al parecer, los Dreepy que residen en sus cuernos esperan con ilusión el momento de ser propulsados a velocidad supersónica.

name: Zacian
pokedex: Este Pokémon está considerado como un héroe de leyenda. Absorbe el metal para transformarlo y emplearlo como armamento.

name: Zamazenta
pokedex: Este Pokémon se erigió en salvador de Galar, tras unir fuerzas con un rey de los hombres. Absorbe el metal para utilizarlo en combate.

name: Eternatus
pokedex: Se alimenta de la energía que brota de la tierra de Galar absorbiéndola por el núcleo del pecho.

name: Kubfu
pokedex: Al tirar de los mechones blancos de la cabeza, acrecienta su espíritu luchador y empieza a acumular fuerza en el órgano de su bajo vientre.

name: Urshifu
pokedex: Vive en en zonas montañosas en áreas recónditas, donde entrena corriendo por escarpados riscos para fortalecer sus piernas y refinar su técnica.

name: Zarude
pokedex: Las lianas que le brotan del cuerpo nutren y fertilizan el mantillo del bosque cuando se le desprenden.

name: Regieleki
pokedex: Su cuerpo entero es energía eléctrica. Por lo visto, quitarle los anillos que lleva libera su poder oculto.

name: Regidrago
pokedex: Todo su cuerpo es una gema de energía dragón cristalizada. Se cree que posee los poderes de todos los Pokémon dragón.

name: Glastrier
pokedex: Cuenta con una fuerza física sobrecogedora. La máscara de hielo que le cubre el rostro es cien veces más dura que el diamante.

name: Spectrier
pokedex: Examina su entorno con todos los sentidos, salvo la vista. Se dice que sus coces son capaces de robarle el alma a quien las recibe.

name: Calyrex
pokedex: Un Pokémon muy compasivo agraciado con el poder de la curación. Reinó en Galar en tiempos remotos.

name: Cefireon
pokedex: Se ha hecho uno con el viento y ahora es capaz de dominarlo a voluntad. Vuela a gran velocidad atravesando nubes y tormentas.

name: Maidible
pokedex: Its giant jaws are actually steel horns that transformed. It fools foes into complacency with its adorable gestures, then chomps them with its huge jaws.

name: Zippectre
pokedex: An abandoned plush doll became this Pokémon. They are said to live in garbage dumps and wander about in search of the children that threw them away.

name: Soundow
pokedex: Its auditory sense is astounding. It has a radar-like ability to understand its surrounding through slight sounds.

name: Kleavor
pokedex: A Scizor has a body with the hardness of steel. It is not easily fazed by ordinary sorts of attacks. It flaps its wings to regulate its body temperature.

name: Wyrdeer
pokedex: Stantler's magnificent antlers were once traded at high prices as works of art. As a result, this Pokémon was hunted close to extinction.

name: Basculegion
pokedex: Red and blue Basculin usually do not get along, but sometimes members of one school mingle with the other's schooL.

name: Overqwil
pokedex: A Qwilfish uses the pressure of water it swallows to shoot toxic quills all at once from all over its body. It finds swimming to be somewhat challenging.

name: Sneasler
pokedex: They live in cold regions, forming groups of four or five that hunt prey with impressive coordination.

name: Missingno
pokedex: La Pokedex no tiene información sobre este Pokemon.

name: Sprigatito
pokedex: Su sedoso pelaje se asemeja en composición a las plantas. Se lava la cara con diligencia para que no se le seque.

name: Floragato
pokedex: Maneja diestramente la vid oculta bajo su largo pelaje y propina latigazos al enemigo con el capullo endurecido de la punta.

name: Meowscarada
pokedex: Se sirve de la luz que reflejan los tricomas de su manto de hojas para camuflar la vid y crear la ilusión óptica de que la flor flota en el aire.

name: Fuecoco
pokedex: Yace sobre rocas calientes, cuyo calor transforma en energía ígnea tras absorberlo por sus escamas rectangulares.

name: Crocalor
pokedex: La mezcla de energía ígnea con el exceso de su propia fuerza vital ha tomado la forma de una bola de fuego de aspecto oval sobre su cabeza.

name: Skeledirge
pokedex: Se dice que el pájaro flamígero al que da forma su canto es un espíritu que moraba en la bola de fuego que le coronaba la cabeza.

name: Quaxly
pokedex: Un Pokémon llegado hace tiempo desde tierras lejanas y ya establecido en la región. El gel que secreta por las plumas repele el agua y la mugre.

name: Quaxwell
pokedex: Fortalece las extremidades corriendo con tesón por los bajíos. Compite con los suyos para ver cuál posee una técnica más grácil con las patas.

name: Quaquaval
pokedex: Realiza una exótica danza mientras controla la tremenda fuerza de sus extremidades, capaces de hacer volcar un camión de una patada.

name: Lechonk
pokedex: Posee un olfato muy desarrollado que emplea únicamente para buscar comida, actividad a la que dedica el día entero.

name: Oinkologne
pokedex: Su piel suave y lustrosa es su mayor orgullo. Desprende una fragancia concentrada por la punta de la cola.

name: Dudunsparce
pokedex: Usa su dura cola para horadar el lecho rocoso en las profundidades de la tierra y establecer su madriguera, cuyos túneles se extienden 10 km.

name: Tarountula
pokedex: La bola de hilo que le rodea el cuerpo es lo bastante elástica como para repeler las guadañas de los Scyther, su enemigo natural.

name: Spidops
pokedex: Se adhiere con su hilo a ramas y techos, por los que se desplaza en silencio. Acaba con su presa antes de que esta se percate de su presencia.

name: Nymble
pokedex: Mantiene plegado su tercer par de patas, cuya fuerza le permite saltar a más de 10 m de altura para huir en caso de apuro.

name: Lokix
pokedex: Cuando decide luchar sin cuartel, se alza con su tercer par de patas y entra en modo asalto. Acaba con el rival en un abrir y cerrar de ojos.

name: Rellor
pokedex: Mezcla tierra, arena y energía psíquica para crear una bola de barro que atesora por encima de su propia vida.

name: Rabsca
pokedex: El cuerpo que sostiene la bola apenas se mueve, por lo que se cree que el cuerpo en el interior de esta es quien controla sus acciones.

name: Greavard
pokedex: Se cree que es la reencarnación de un Pokémon perro vagabundo que murió sin haber tenido contacto con humanos.

name: Houndstone
pokedex: Pasa la mayor parte del tiempo durmiendo en cementerios. De todos los Pokémon perro, es el que profesa una mayor lealtad por su Entrenador.

name: Flittle
pokedex: La punta de sus extremidades levita a 1 cm del suelo a causa del poder psíquico que emiten los volantes de su abdomen.

name: Espathra
pokedex: Baña al rival con el poder psíquico que emana de sus grandes ojos y lo inmoviliza. A pesar de su aspecto, posee un temperamento feroz.

name: Farigiraf
pokedex: Las ondas cerebrales de la cola y la cabeza van al compás, lo que le confiere poderes psíquicos diez veces más potentes que los de los Girafarig.

name: Dondozo
pokedex: Le gusta mucho comer, pero no se le da bien cazar, por lo que aúna fuerzas con Tatsugiri con el fin de capturar presas.

name: Veluza
pokedex: Al desechar la carne que no necesita, agudiza la mente y sus poderes psíquicos se incrementan. Dicha carne tiene un sabor suave pero exquisito.

name: Finizen
pokedex: Le gusta jugar con sus congéneres con el anillo de agua de su aleta caudal. Utiliza ultrasonidos para percibir las emociones de otros seres.

name: Palafin
pokedex: Cambia de forma en cuanto recibe una señal de socorro de sus compañeros. Nunca se transforma delante de nadie.

name: Smoliv
pokedex: Se defiende de sus rivales segregando por el fruto de su cabeza un aceite tan amargo y agrio que cualquiera daría un respingo al probarlo.

name: Dolliv
pokedex: No duda en compartir su delicioso aceite de fresco aroma. Convive con los seres humanos desde hace mucho tiempo.

name: Arboliva
pokedex: Es pacífico y compasivo. Comparte su delicioso y nutritivo aceite con los Pokémon que han perdido las fuerzas.

name: Capsakid
pokedex: Cuanto más se expone al sol, más aumenta la cantidad de capsaicinoides de su cuerpo y, por lo tanto, la pungencia de sus movimientos.

name: Scovillain
pokedex: La cabeza roja transforma los capsaicinoides de su cuerpo en energía flamígera, lo que le permite arrojar llamaradas extremadamente abrasadoras.

name: Tadbulb
pokedex: Produce electricidad agitando la cola. Si siente peligro, hace parpadear su cabeza para alertar a sus compañeros.

name: Bellibolt
pokedex: Puede generar grandes cantidades de energía expandiendo y contrayendo su elástico cuerpo gracias a la dinamo de su ombligo.

name: Varoom
pokedex: Se dice que surgió cuando un misterioso Pokémon venenoso tomó posesión de un motor abandonado en un desguace.

name: Revavroom
pokedex: Posee ocho cilindros, con los que genera energía haciendo estallar el gas que produce al mezclar los minerales de las rocas con su veneno.

name: Orthworm
pokedex: Cuando lo atacan, usa los pelos de su cuerpo a modo de puños y hace llover un aluvión de puñetazos sobre sus enemigos.

name: Tandemaus
pokedex: Cuando encuentran un material que les parece útil para su nido, lo recortan con sus incisivos y lo acarrean, todo en perfecta compenetración.

name: Maushold
pokedex: Construyen grandes nidos que dividen en varias cámaras destinadas a distintas funciones, como dormir o comer.

name: Cetoddle
pokedex: Los miembros de esta especie, emparentada al parecer con los Wailmer, abandonaron hace ya mucho tiempo el mar para vivir en tierra firme.

name: Cetitan
pokedex: Este Pokémon vive en áreas cubiertas de nieve y hielo. Se protege con su fuerte musculatura y una gruesa capa de grasa subcutánea.

name: Frigibax
pokedex: Absorbe el calor a través de la placa dorsal y lo convierte en energía gélida. Cuanto más alta es la temperatura, más energía acumula.

name: Arctibax
pokedex: Congela el aire a su alrededor para cubrirse el rostro con una máscara de hielo protectora y dotar su placa dorsal de cuchillas glaciales.

name: Baxcalibur
pokedex: Exhala un aliento extremadamente frío por la boca que es capaz de congelar al instante incluso magma al rojo vivo.

name: Tatsugiri
pokedex: Pokémon dragón de pequeño tamaño. Vive en la boca de un Dondozo para protegerse de los ataques de los depredadores.

name: Cyclizar
pokedex: Según parece, ha permitido que los humanos monten en él desde tiempos remotos. Aparece en pinturas rupestres de hace diez mil años.

name: Pawmi
pokedex: Como las bolsas de sus mejillas están poco desarrolladas, genera electricidad frotándolas con las almohadillas de sus patas delanteras.

name: Pawmo
pokedex: Cuando su manada se ve amenazada, atacan a la vanguardia usando un arte marcial caracterizado por el empleo de descargas eléctricas.

name: Pawmot
pokedex: Este Pokémon es normalmente bastante calmado, pero, una vez en combate, derriba a sus rivales con movimientos de una velocidad vertiginosa.

name: Wattrel
pokedex: Los huesos de sus alas producen electricidad con las corrientes de aire. Para cazar, se zambulle en el mar y electrocuta a su presa.

name: Kilowattrel
pokedex: Aumenta la intensidad de su electricidad al inflar su saco gular. Es capaz de recorrer 700 km en un día impulsado por las corrientes de aire.

name: Bombirdier
pokedex: Mete cosas en su bolsa, fabricada con el plumón de su pecho y con plumas mudadas, para luego dejarlas caer desde las alturas por diversión.

name: Squawkabilly
pokedex: Prefieren vivir en las ciudades. Forman bandadas según el color de su plumaje y libran disputas por el control de los territorios.

name: Flamigo
pokedex: Al parecer, se anudan la base del cuello para impedir que la energía que tienen almacenada en el estómago escape por el pico.

name: Klawf
pokedex: Acecha a sus presas colgado cabeza abajo de los acantilados, pero no puede aguantar así mucho tiempo porque se le sube la sangre a la cabeza.

name: Nacli
pokedex: Surgen de estratos salinos subterráneos. Antaño se los tenía en alta estima, pues compartían su sal, un mineral por entonces muy preciado.

name: Naclstack
pokedex: Escupe sal para recubrir con ella a sus presas y someterlas a un proceso de salazón que extrae la humedad de sus cuerpos.

name: Garganacl
pokedex: Cuando encuentra a un Pokémon herido, frota las puntas de los dedos para rociarlo con sal y curar rápidamente incluso las heridas más graves.

name: Glimmet
pokedex: Absorbe nutrientes de las paredes de las cuevas. Cubre su cuerpo con pétalos hechos de energía venenosa cristalizada.

name: Glimmora
pokedex: En cuanto percibe peligro, abre sus pétalos de cristal y despide rayos por su cuerpo en forma de cono.

name: Shroodle
pokedex: Es manso, pero muerde y paraliza a quien lo enfada con sus afilados incisivos impregnados de toxinas.

name: Grafaiai
pokedex: El color de su saliva venenosa varía según su alimentación. Se embadurna los dedos con ella para pintar motivos en los árboles del bosque.

name: Fidough
pokedex: Resulta húmedo y suave al tacto. Hace fermentar las cosas a su alrededor con la levadura de su aliento.

name: Dachsbun
pokedex: El fragante aroma que despide su cuerpo favorece el crecimiento del trigo, por lo que lo aprecian mucho en las comunidades agrícolas.

name: Maschiff
pokedex: Mantiene el ceño fruncido para que sus rivales lo tomen en serio, pero hasta el niño más llorón estallaría en carcajadas al ver su mueca.

name: Mabosstiff
pokedex: Almacena energía en la papada y la libera toda de golpe para arrasar con sus rivales.

name: Bramblin
pokedex: Se dice que este Pokémon nace cuando las almas en pena terminan enredadas en la hierba seca tras ser arrastradas por el viento.

name: Brambleghast
pokedex: Despliega las ramas para engullir a sus presas. Cuando ha terminado de absorber su energía vital, las escupe.

name: Gimmighoul
pokedex: El cofre en el que nació data de hace 1500 años aproximadamente. Absorbe la energía vital de los granujas que intentan hacerse con su tesoro.

name: Gholdengo
pokedex: Se dice que su cuerpo está formado por 1000 monedas. Es capaz de hacer buenas migas con cualquiera rápidamente por su sociabilidad.

name: Tinkatink
pokedex: Agita su martillo forjado a mano para ahuyentar a posibles amenazas, pero los Pokémon que se alimentan a base de metal suelen robárselo.

name: Tinkatuff
pokedex: Asalta el séquito entero de un Bisharp para reunir metal con el que forjar su enorme y robusto martillo.

name: Tinkaton
pokedex: Posee una notable inteligencia y una exacerbada personalidad. Si ve Corviknight volando, golpea y lanza rocas con su martillo para derribarlos.

name: Charcadet
pokedex: Nació de unos restos de carbón consumidos por las llamas. Reta a rivales poderosos para saciar su ardiente espíritu combativo.

name: Armarouge
pokedex: Evolucionó al portar la armadura de un guerrero de renombre. Este Pokémon destaca por su gran lealtad.

name: Ceruledge
pokedex: Las afiladas llamas que cubren sus brazos están avivadas por la frustración de un espadachín que cayó antes de poder cumplir su cometido.

name: Kingambit
pokedex: Solo el Bisharp más destacado entre las filas de cada gran ejército tiene el honor de evolucionar a Kingambit.

name: Clodsire
pokedex: Cuando se siente amenazado, repele al enemigo con sus gruesas púas retráctiles. Esta técnica tan peligrosa es un arma de doble filo.

name: Annihilape
pokedex: Cuando su ira explosiva rebasó el punto crítico, adquirió un poder que lo libró para siempre de las limitaciones de su cuerpo material.

name: Wo-Chien
pokedex: Este Pokémon nació al imbuirse en hojas marchitas el rencor de una persona castigada por enumerar las fechorías de su rey en unas tablillas.

name: Chien-Pao
pokedex: Controla a su voluntad masas de nieve de hasta cien toneladas. Se divierte zambulléndose y saltando felizmente en los aludes que provoca.

name: Ting-Lu
pokedex: Este Pokémon nació al imbuirse en tierra y rocas el miedo vertido en un caldero que se utilizaba en rituales antiguos.

name: Chi-Yu
pokedex: Controla a su voluntad llamas de hasta 3000 ºC. Nada tranquilamente por los mares de magma que crea al derretir las rocas y la grava a su paso.

name: Koraidon
pokedex: Procede de la paradoja de un Cyclizar, viene de un tiempo donde suelen ser mucho más violentos y fornidos. Se desconoce totalmente su relación con el entorno y otros seres vivos.

name: Miraidon
pokedex: Pese a las similitudes con los Cyclizar, es mucho más fuerte y despiadado que ellos. Está rodeado de incógnitas.

name: Ursaluna
pokedex: In forests, it is said that there are many streams and towering trees where an Ursaring gathers food. It walks through its forest collecting food every day.

name: Enamorus
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Cherrilier
pokedex: It blooms during times of strong sunlight. It tries to make up for everything it endured as a bud.

name: Royaleon
pokedex: Un Pokémon que perteneció a los grandes reyes del pasado por su porte y enorme poder. Se le creía desaparecido.

name: Gourmaus
pokedex: Construyen grandes nidos que dividen en varias cámaras destinadas a distintas funciones, como dormir o comer.

name: Dipplin
pokedex: Ha evolucionado tras ingerir una manzana dulce. De ahí que el olor que emana para atraer a sus presas, los Pokémon insecto, sea tan agradable.

name: Okidogi
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Munkidori
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Fezandipiti
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Ogerpon
pokedex: The energy that comes pouring from its tail increases the nutrition in the soil, making crops grow to great size.

name: Sinistcha
pokedex: Se hospeda en teteras dignas de un anticuario. Las originales son escasísimas, pero existe un gran número de burdas falsificaciones.

name: Archaludon
pokedex: Su cuerpo, similar a un metal pulido, es tan ligero como robusto. Sin embargo, tiene el defecto de que se oxida con facilidad.

name: Hydrapple
pokedex: Ha evolucionado tras ingerir una manzana dulce. De ahí que el olor que emana para atraer a sus presas, los Pokémon insecto, sea tan agradable.

name: Halcombate
pokedex: Halcombate es un Hawlucha que ascendió a campeón de lucha libre tras innumerables victorias contra Pokémon como Machamp o Lucario.

name: Serdupla
pokedex: Seviper and Zangoose are eternal rivals. It counters a Zangoose's dazzling agility with its swordlike tail, which also oozes a horrible poison.

name: Zanghoul
pokedex: When it battles, it stands on its hind legs and attacks with its sharply clawed forelegs. Its fur bristles if it encounters any Seviper.

name: Freyjynx
pokedex: Dicen que su poderosa voz es capaz de convocar ventiscas terribles. Cantan en honor a los grandes guerreros de las leyendas.

name: Fobeto
pokedex: The arcing movement and glitter of the pendulum in a Hypno's hand lull the foe into deep hypnosis. While searching for prey, it polishes the pendulum.

name: Constellar
pokedex: It becomes very active on the night of a full moon. This Pokémon was first discovered 40 years ago at the site of a meteor strike.

name: Luvourne
pokedex: Luvdisc make the branches of Corsola their nests. There is a custom from long ago of giving a Luvdisc as a gift to express one's feelings of love.

name: Marolier
pokedex: Usan su hueso para producir sonidos golpeando rocas para avisar a otros de que están invadiendo su territorio o para impresionar a las hembras.

name: Sudrasil
pokedex: It mimics a tree to avoid being attacked by enemies. But since its forelegs remain green throughout the year, it is easily identified as a fake in the winter.

name: Terapagos
pokedex: Se vale de su capacidad para transformar energía en duros cristales para protegerse. Se creía que este Pokémon de la Padea antigua se había extinguido, víctima de alteraciones en la corteza terrestre debidas a la actividad tectónica.

name: Pecharunt
pokedex: Hace comer a su objetivo un mochi tóxico que saca a relucir todo su potencial y su ambición, para después controlarlo con sus cadenas.

name: Auretosk
pokedex: Una manifestación del Caos primigenio del universo, siempre tramando alguna artimaña. Su cola desprende energía lumínica infinita.
